27.29: Bann nasion ava servi twa, bann pep ava kourbe divan twa. To pou enn sef parmi to bann frer, zot pou prostern divan twa. Seki modi twa pou gagn malediksion, seki beni twa pou gagn benediksion!”
27.30: Izaak finn donn Zakob so benediksion. Apenn Zakob kit lasam so papa, Ezai sorti lasas.
27.31: Li prepar enn bon repa e li amenn pou so papa. Li dir so papa: “Asize Papa, manz laviann ki to garson finn prepare. Lerla to ava donn mwa to benediksion.”
27.32: Me so papa Izaak dimann li: “Kisannla twa?” Li reponn: “Mwa sa, Ezai, to premie garson.”
27.33: Poulekou, Izaak gagn enn gran tranbleman. Li dir: “Me kisannla finn al lasas e finn prepar enn bon laviann pou mwa? Mo fek fini manz tou avan to vini e mo finn beni li. Mo pa pou kapav retir benediksion la.”
27.34: Kan Ezai tann sa, so leker ranpli ar koler. Li koumans plore for-for. Lerla li dir so papa: “Donn mwa osi enn benediksion, papa!”
27.35: So papa dir li: “To frer finn trik mwa, e li finn pran to benediksion.”
27.36: Ezai dir: “Li merit bien so nom Zakob; li enn triser. Sa fer deziem fwa li trik mwa. Premie fwa li ti pran mo drwa premie garson. Asterla, li finn pran mo benediksion.” Lerla, li dir so papa: “Pa, eski to pa finn rezerv enn benediksion pou mwa?”
27.37: Izaak reponn: “Mo garson, mo finn fini fer to frer vinn to met. Asterla, tou so bann frer pou vinn so bann serviter. Mo finn osi donn li benediksion labondans manze ek bwar. Ki mo pou kapav fer pou twa aster?”
27.38: Ezai dir so papa: “Eski to pa kapav donn enn lot benediksion? Beni mwa osi, pa!” Lerla li rekoumans plore for-for.
27.39: Alor, Izaak dir li sa bann parol la: “Ekout seki mo ena pou dir twa mo garson: To pou viv lwin ar later fertil, lwin ar lapli ki tom depi lesiel.
27.40: To pou bizin viv ar lafors to lepe, e to pou vinn serviter to frer; Me kan ler pou arive, to pou libere. Lerla li pou nepli ena pouvwar lor twa.”
27.41: Ezai deteste Zakob akoz li finn pran benediksion zot papa dan so plas. Li dir: “Mo papa pre pou mor. Sa zour la Zakob pou peye. Mo pou touy li.”
27.42: Rebeka aprann ki lintansion so premie garson, Ezai, ena. Alor, li fer apel so garson Zakob e li dir li: “Pran kont, to frer ena lintansion pou touy twa.
27.43: Asterla, ekout mwa bien mo garson! Sove ale! Al kot mo frer Laban dan Arann.
27.44: Res kot li inpe letan, ziska ki koler to frer kalme.
27.45: Kan so koler pou pase, li pou bliye seki to finn fer li. Lerla mo pou avoy nouvel pou to retourne. Mo pa anvi perdi zot toulede, mem zour.”
27.46: Lerla, Rebeka dir Izaak: “Deza, mo de belfi Itit pe rann mo lavi amer. Asterla, si Zakob osi marye avek enn tifi Itit, mo krwar mo pou degout mo lavi.”

28.1: Izaak fer apel Zakob e li beni li. Lerla li dir Zakob: “Pa bizin marye avek enn tifi Kananeenn.
28.2: Al deswit kot to granper Betouel dan Padann-Aram. Laba to ava marye avek enn parmi bann tifi to tonton Laban.
28.3: Ki Bondie Toupwisan beni twa. Li ava donn twa boukou zanfan. To pou vinn anset enn gran pep.
28.4: Li ava beni twa ek to bann desandan parey kouma li ti beni Abraam. Li ti promet Abraam sa pei la. Zordi, nou pe viv isi kouma bann etranze. Me enn zour, twa ki pou erit sa pei la.”
28.5: Alor, Izaak fer Zakob al Padann-Aram, kot so tonton Laban. Laban gran frer Rebeka, e zot papa apel Betouel, enn Arameen.
28.6: Ezai aprann ki Izaak finn beni Zakob, e finn avoy li al marye dan Padann-Aram. Li aprann osi ki Izaak finn defann Zakob pran enn fam Kananeenn.
28.7: Ezai trouve ki Zakob finn obeir so papa ek so mama, e finn al Padann-Aram.
28.8: Alor, li konpran ki so papa Izaak pa kontan bann tifi Kananeenn.
28.9: Lerlamem, li desid pou pran ankor enn fam. Li marye avek Mahalat, tifi Ismael, garson Abraam. Mahalat ena enn ser ki apel Nebayot.
28.10: Zakob finn kit Berseba, e li pe pran direksion Arann.
28.11: Li aret dan enn plas pou pas lanwit, parski soley ti finn kouse. Li met enn ros anba so latet e li dormi.
28.12: Lerla Zakob fer enn rev. Dan so rev, li trouv enn long leskalie ki pran depi lor later e ki al ziska dan lesiel. Bann anz Bondie pe monte-desann lor leskalie la.
28.13: LESEGNER vinn dibout divan li e dir li: “Momem LESEGNER, Bondie to granper Abraam ek Bondie Izaak. Mo pou donn twa ek to bann desandan sa later kot to pe dormi la.
28.14: Mo pou ogmant to bann desandan e zot pou vinn boukou kouma lapousier later. Zot teritwar pou grandi depi lwes ziska les, e depi lenor ziska lesid. Mo pou beni tou bann fami lor later atraver twa ek to bann desandan.
28.15: Mo pou touzour avek twa pou protez twa partou kot to ale. Mo pou fer twa retourn dan sa pei la. Mo pa pou abandonn twa e mo pou realiz tou seki mo finn promet twa.”
28.16: Ler somey Zakob kase, li dir: “LESEGNER prezan dan sa landrwa la, me mo pa ti kone.”
28.17: Zakob gagn per, e li dir: “Sa landrwa la, extra sa! Mo sir lamem lakaz Bondie ek laport lesiel.”
28.18: Zakob lev boner gramatin. Li pran sa ros ki ti anba so latet la e li met li dibout. Lerla, li vers delwil lor ros la.
28.19: Li apel sa landrwa la Betel, ki vedir Lakaz Bondie. Avan, sa landrwa la ti apel Louz.
28.20: Lerla, Zakob fer enn promes: “Si Bondie res avek mwa, e protez mwa dan mo vwayaz, si li donn mwa manze ek linz,
28.21: e si li fer mwa retourn lakaz mo papa anbien, alor, LESEGNER pou mo Bondie.
28.22: Sa ros ki mo finn drese e konsakre la, pou vinn enn lakaz pou Bondie. Mo pou donn twa dis poursan dan tou seki to donn mwa.”

29.1: Zakob kontign so larout dan direksion les.
29.2: Li lev latet e li trouv enn pwi dan enn karo. Trwa troupo mouton pe repoze pre kot pwi la. Lamem zot gagn dilo pou bwar. Pwi la kouver ek enn gro ros.
29.3: Bann berze pe atann tou bann troupo rasanble pou zot roul ros la. Zot pou tir dilo pou fer bann mouton bwar. Apre sa, zot pou remet ros la dan so plas.
29.4: Zakob dimann zot: “Mo bann frer, kot zot reste?” Zot reponn li: “Nou res Arann.”
29.5: Li dimann zot: “Eski zot konn Laban, tizanfan Nahor?” Zot reponn: “Wi, nou konn li.”
29.6: Zakob dimann zot: “Eski li bien?” Zot dir li: “Wi, li bien! Ala so tifi Rasel pe vini ek so troupo.”
29.7: Lerla Zakob dir zot: “Soley ankor anler. Pankor ler pou met zanimo dan park. Kifer zot pa fer bann zanimo la bwar e apre retourn dan patiraz?”
29.8: Me zot dir li: “Nou pa pou fer sa avan ki tou bann troupo rasanble. Kan tou zanimo fini rasanble, nou pou roul ros la pou fer zot tou bwar ansam.”
29.9: Zakob ankor pe koz ek bann berze kan Rasel arive avek troupo so papa. Rasel enn gardien mouton.
29.10: Kan Zakob trouv so kouzinn Rasel ek troupo so tonton Laban, li roul gro ros ki kouver pwi la. Lerla, li donn bann zanimo Laban bwar.
29.11: Apre sa, Zakob anbras Rasel e li koumans plore for-for.
29.12: Zakob dir li: “Mo enn fami to papa. Mwa, garson Rebeka, ser to papa.” Lerla, Rasel galoupe al dir sa so papa.
29.13: Kouma Laban tann koz Zakob, garson so ser, li galoupe vinn zwenn li. Li may li e anbras li. Apre, li amenn li so lakaz. Laba, Zakob rakont Laban tou seki ti finn arive.
29.14: Laban dir li: “Twa ek mwa nou ena mem disan.” Zakob pas enn mwa kot Laban.
29.15: Enn zour, Laban dir Zakob: “Mo kone to mo neve. Me sa pa enn rezon pouki to travay kado pou mwa. Dir mwa ki lapey to ti anvi mo donn twa.”
29.16: Laban ena de tifi. Premie la apel Lea, e deziem la Rasel.
29.17: Lea ena enn zoli regar # 29:17 Dans plizir tradiksion, ansien ek modern, zot dir ki Lea ti ena lizie tern, san expresion. , me Rasel enn extra zoli tifi.
29.18: Zakob kontan Rasel. Alor, li dir Laban: “Si to dakor, mo pou travay pou twa pandan set an. Lerla, mo ava marye avek Rasel, to deziem tifi.”
29.19: Laban aksepte kondision Zakob. Li dir: “Vomie mo fer li marye avek twa, ki avek enn lot zom. To kapav reste, travay.”
29.20: Zakob travay set an pou Laban, pou kapav marye avek Rasel. Me li trouv sa set an la pas vit, telman li kontan Rasel.
29.21: Lerla, Zakob dir Laban: “Mo finn travay pou twa pandan set an. Asterla, donn mwa mo fam pou nou al mont nou menaz.”
29.22: Alor, Laban organiz enn gran repa maryaz. Li invit tou bann dimoun dan landrwa.
29.23: Me aswar, Laban pran so tifi Lea e li amenn li dan lasam Zakob. Zakob pa konn ditou e li pas lanwit avek Lea.
29.24: Laban donn Lea so servant Zilpa pou servi li.
29.25: Landime gramatin, Zakob gagn sok kan li trouv Lea dan so lili. Lerla, li dir Laban: “Kifer to finn fer sa ar mwa? Mo finn travay pou twa set an pou mo gagn Rasel. Alor, kifer to finn trik mwa?”
29.26: Laban dir li: “Dapre nou koutim, nou pa kapav marye ti-ser avan gran-ser.
29.27: Les sa semenn lanos la pase pou Lea. Lerla, nou ava donn twa Rasel osi. Me to pou bizin travay ankor set an pou mwa.”
29.28: Zakob aksepte e li terminn so semenn lanos avek Lea. Apre sa, Laban fer li marye avek Rasel osi.
29.29: Laban donn Rasel so servant Bila pou servi li.
29.30: Alor, Zakob al avek Rasel, e li kontan li plis ki Lea. Lerla, li travay ankor set an pou Laban.
29.31: LESEGNER trouve ki Lea malerez. Li beni Lea pou li gagn zanfan. Me Rasel res steril.
29.32: Alor, Lea tom ansint e li gagn enn garson. Li apel li Riben, ki vedir trouve. Lea dir : “LESEGNER finn trouv mo soufrans. Asterla, mo mari pou kontan mwa.”
29.33: Lea tom ansint enn deziem fwa e li gagn ankor enn garson. Li dir: “LESEGNER finn kone ki mo ti malerez. Li finn donn mwa sa garson la osi.” Li ti apel li Simeon # 29:33 Simeon resanble enn verb dan Ebre ki vedir “finn kone”. .
29.34: Lea tom ansint enn trwaziem fwa, e li gagn ankor enn garson. Lerla li dir: “Asterla, mo mari pou atase avek mwa, parski mo finn donn li trwa garson.” Zakob apel garson la Levi # 29:34 An Ebre Levi resanble enn verb ki vedir “atase”. .
29.35: Lea tom ansint enn katriem fwa, e li gagn ankor enn garson. Li dir: “Sann fwa la mo pou loue LESEGNER.” Alor, li apel garson la Zida # 29:35 Nom Zida vinn depi enn mo ki vedir loue. . Lerla Lea aret gagn zanfan.

30.1: Rasel remarke ki li pa kapav gagn zanfan. Li zalou so ser Lea. Li dir Zakob: “Donn mwa zanfan, sinon mo pou mor.”
30.2: Zakob ankoler ar li e dir li: “Eski to krwar mo Bondie mwa? Bondie ki finn anpes twa gagn zanfan.”
30.3: Lerla Rasel dir li: “Ala mo servant Bila. Gagn relasion ek li. Kan li gagn zanfan, zot ava vinn pou mwa # 30:3 Get Zenez sapit 16, verse 2 ek so not. . Lerla, atraver li, mwa osi mo pou ena zanfan.”
30.4: Rasel donn Zakob so servant Bila pou fam. Zakob gagn relasion ek li.
30.5: Bila tom ansint, e li gagn enn garson pou Zakob.
30.6: Lerla, Rasel dir: “Bondie finn fer lazistis pou mwa. Li finn ekzos mo lapriyer, e li finn donn mwa enn garson.” Alor, li apel garson la Dann # 30:6 Nom Dann resanble enn lexpresion Ebre ki vedir “li finn zize.” .
30.7: Bila, servant Rasel, tom ansint ankor. Li donn Zakob enn deziem garson.
30.8: Lerla Rasel dir: “Bondie finn donn mwa kouraz pou lit kont mo ser. Mo finn ranport laviktwar.” Alor, li apel garson la Neftali, ki vedir lite.
30.9: Kan Lea trouve ki li finn aret gagn zanfan, li donn Zakob so servant Zilpa pou fam.
30.10: Zilpa gagn enn garson pou Zakob.
30.11: Lerla, Lea dir: “Sa enn sans!” E li apel garson la Gad, ki vedir lasans.
30.12: Zilpa, servant Lea, donn Zakob enn deziem garson.
30.13: Lea dir: “Mo dan lazwa! Asterla, tou bann fam kapav dir mo erez.” Alor li apel garson la Aser, ki vedir leboner.
30.14: Enn zour, pandan rekolt dible, Riben al dan karo e li trouv mandrak # 30:14 Mandrak ti konsidere kouma enn plant ki ti ena verti pou fer enn fam vinn fekon. . Li kas zot, e li amenn pou so mama Lea. Rasel trouv sa e li dir Lea: “Silteple, donn mwa de-trwa mandrak ki to garson finn amene.”
30.15: Me Lea dir li: “Deza to finn pran mo mari. Asterla, to anvi pran mandrak ki mo garson finn amene?” Rasel reponn: “Si to donn mwa de-trwa mandrak, mo fer Zakob dormi avek twa aswar.”
30.16: Ler ariv tanto, Zakob sorti dan karo. Lea al zwenn li e dir li: “To pou dormi avek mwa aswar. Mo finn pey ek mandrak ki mo garson finn amene.” Alor Zakob dormi avek Lea sa swar la.
30.17: Bondie ekzos lapriyer Lea. Li tom ansint e li gagn enn sinkiem garson pou Zakob.
30.18: Lea dir: “Bondie finn rekonpans mwa, akoz mo finn donn mo mari mo servant pou fam.” Lerla li apel garson la Isakar # 30:18 Nom Isakar vinn depi enn mo Ebre ki vedir rekonpans. .
30.19: Plitar, Lea tom ansint ankor enn fwa. Li gagn enn siziem garson pou Zakob.
30.20: Lea kriye: “Bondie finn donn mwa enn zoli kado. Aster mo mari pou donn mwa loner, parski mo finn donn li sis garson.” Lerla, li apel garson la Zabilon # 30:20 Sa nom la vinn depi enn verb Ebre ki vedir “pou onor mwa.” .
30.21: Apre inpe letan, Lea gagn osi enn tifi e li apel li Dina.
30.22: Bondie pa finn bliye Rasel. Li ekzos so lapriyer e li fer li gagn zanfan.
30.23: Rasel tom ansint e li gagn enn garson. Lerla, li kriye ar lazwa: “Bondie finn anlev mo laont.”
30.24: Li apel garson la Zozef, parski li ti swete ki Bondie donn li ankor enn garson.
30.25: Apre nesans Zozef, Zakob dir Laban: “Les mwa retourn kot mwa, dan mo pei.
30.26: Les mwa amenn mo bann zanfan ek mo bann fam. Mo finn travay dir pou gagn zot. Tomem to kone ki kantite travay mo finn fer pou twa.”
30.27: Me Laban dir li: “Ekout mwa, silteple! Mo finn trouve ki grasa twa, LESEGNER finn beni mwa.
30.28: Dir mwa ki lapey to oule e mo pou donn twa.”
30.29: Zakob dir li: “Tomem to kone ki kantite travay mo finn fer pou twa. To kone osi kouma to bann troupo finn ogmante avek mwa.
30.30: Avan mo ti vinn kot twa, to pa ti ena boukou kitsoz. Asterla, to dibien finn bien ogmante. LESEGNER finn beni twa depi ki mo finn vinn kot twa. To pa panse finn ler pou mo travay pou mo prop fami asterla?”
30.31: Laban dir li: “Dir mwa ki lapey mo bizin donn twa.” Zakob reponn li: “Pa bizin to donn mwa nanye. Mo ena enn propozision pou fer twa. Si to aksepte, mo pou kontign okip to bann zanimo.
30.32: Permet mwa pas dan to bann troupo. Les mwa pran bann mouton ek kabri ki ena tas lor zot. Les mwa pran osi bann mouton kouler fonse. Samem lapey mo dimann twa.
30.33: Plitar to pou fasil kone si mo finn onet avek twa. To ava vinn verifie. Si to trouv mouton ki pa kouler fonse ek zanimo ki pena tas, to pou kone mo finn kokin twa.”
30.34: Laban dir li: “Dakor, mo aksepte to propozision.”
30.35: Sa mem zour la, Laban pran tou so bann mouton kouler fonse, ek tou bann zanimo ki ena tas, e ki are. Li konfie zot so bann garson.
30.36: Li fer zot al enn distans trwa zour lamars, lwin ar Zakob. Zakob okip leres troupo Laban.
30.37: Zakob kas bann brans tann lor trwa diferan pie. Li tir enn parti zot lekors. Sa paret kouma bann rey blan lor bann brans la.
30.38: Li met bann brans reye la kot basin dilo pouki bann zanimo trouv zot kan zot bwar. Bann zanimo kontan akouple kan zot vinn bwar dilo.
30.39: Kan bann zanimo akouple, zot lizie tap lor sa bann brans are la. Lerla, kan bann femel met ba, zot piti ne are. Ena ne avek tas lor zot.
30.40: Zakob met apar bann zanimo are, bann zanimo ki ena tas ek bann mouton nwar. Li met zot divan bann mouton Laban kan zot akouple. Sa fason la, Zakob kre so prop troupo e li separ zot ek troupo Laban.
30.41: Sak fwa bann zanimo portan akouple, Zakob met bann brans reye divan zot.
30.42: Me kan bann zanimo frel akouple, li pa met bann brans la. Alor, Zakob gagn tou bann zanimo bien portan. Bann zanimo frel res pou Laban.
30.43: Ala ki manier Zakob vinn extra ris. Li gagn boukou troupo, serviter ek servant, samo ek bourik.

31.1: Zakob gagn nouvel ki bann garson Laban pe fer palab lor li. Zot pe dir: “Tou seki Zakob ena ti pou nou papa. Li finn vinn ris lor ledo nou papa.”
31.2: Anplis, Zakob remarke ki Laban finn sanz so manier ar li; li nepli korek kouma avan.
31.3: Alor, LESEGNER dir Zakob: “Retourn dan pei to bann anset, parmi to bann fami. Mwa, mo pou avek twa.”
31.4: Zakob dan patiraz avek bann troupo. Li fer apel Lea ek Rasel.
31.5: Li dir zot: “Mo finn remarke ki zot papa nepli estim mwa kouma avan. Me Bondie ki mo papa adore finn touzour avek mwa.
31.6: Zot kone zot mem kouma mo finn travay bien dir pou zot papa.
31.7: Pourtan, li finn trik mwa e li finn sanz mo lapey dis fwa. Me Bondie pa finn les li fer mwa dimal.
31.8: Zot papa ti dir mwa: ‘Pou to lapey, pran tou bann zanimo ki ena tas lor zot.’ Lerla, tou bann femel dan troupo ti gagn piti avek tas. Zot papa ti dir osi: ‘Pran tou bann zanimo ki are; samem to lapey.’ Lerla tou femel dan troupo finn gagn piti are.
31.9: Bondie, limem ki finn pran troupo zot papa e finn donn mwa.
31.10: Enn swar, kan bann zanimo ti pe akouple, mo ti fer enn rev. Dan mo rev, mo ti lev lizie e mo ti trouv bann mal ki ti pe akouple; enn parti ti ena tas e lezot ti are.
31.11: Lerla, anz Bondie ti apel mwa dan mo rev. Mo ti reponn li: ‘Wi, mo lamem.’
31.12: Anz la ti dir mwa: ‘Gete! Tou bann mal ki pe akouple ena tas ouswa are. Mo finn trouv tou seki Laban pe fer twa.
31.13: Momem Bondie ki to ti adore dan Betel. Laba, to ti vers delwil lor enn ros e to ti fer mwa enn promes. Asterla, leve! Kit sa pei la e retourn dan pei to bann fami.’”
31.14: Lerla, Rasel ek Lea dir li: “Nou kone nou pa pou erit nanye ar nou papa.
31.15: Li deza pe tret nou kouma bann etranze. Li finn vann nou, me li pa finn donn nou enn sou.
31.16: Tou rises ki Bondie finn pran ek nou papa, asterla li pou nou ek nou bann zanfan. To kapav fer tou seki Bondie finn dir twa.”
31.17: Zakob leve e met so bann zanfan ek so bann fam lor samo.
31.18: Li amenn avek li tou so bann troupo, ek tou rises ki li finn gagne dan Padann-Aram. Lerla, li pran larout pou al kot so papa Izaak dan pei Kanaan.
31.19: Sa zour la, Laban pa la, parski li finn al tir lalenn lor mouton. Rasel profite pou kokin bann ti-stati so papa.
31.20: Zakob trik Laban ki enn Arameen; li pa dir li nanye lor so depar.
31.21: Li sove avek tou so dibien. Li travers larivier Efrat # 31:21 Dan tex Ebre, pa mantionn Efrat. , e li al dan direksion bann montagn Galaad.
31.22: Trwa zour apre, Laban gagn nouvel ki Zakob finn ale.
31.23: Laban pran so bann zom e li pourswiv Zakob pandan set zour. Li ariv pre avek li dan bann oter Galaad.
31.24: Me Laban, ki enn Arameen, fer enn rev aswar. Dan so rev Bondie dir li: “Fer atansion! Pa bizin dir Zakob nanye; ni seki bon, ni seki move.”
31.25: Kan Laban zwenn Zakob, li pe kanpe lor bann kolinn Galaad. Laban ek so bann zom osi dres zot latant pre laba.
31.26: Laban al get Zakob e dir li: “Kifer to finn fer sa? To finn desevwar mwa, e to finn amenn mo bann tifi kouma bann prizonie.
31.27: Kifer to finn al ankasiet e to pa finn dir mwa nanye? Mo ti pou kapav kondir twa avek bann sante lazwa ek bann instriman lamizik.
31.28: To pa finn mem donn mwa lokazion pou anbras mo bann tifi ek mo bann tizanfan. To finn azir kouma enn bet.
31.29: Mo ena pouvwar pou atak zot, me Bondie to papa finn koz avek mwa yerswar. Li finn dir mwa: ‘Fer atansion! Pa dir Zakob nanye, ni seki bon, ni seki move.’
31.30: Mo konpran ki to ti pe anvi retourn lakaz to papa. Me kifer to ti bizin kokin mo bann ti-stati?”
31.31: Zakob reponn: “Mo ti gagn per tansion to repran to bann tifi par lafors.
31.32: Me si to trouv to bann ti-stati kot kikenn isi, sa dimoun la pou merit lamor. Mo dir twa divan tou dimoun ki la, si to trouv kitsoz pou twa kot mwa, pran li.” Zakob pa kone si Rasel finn kokin bann ti-stati so papa.
31.33: Alor, Laban al fouy dan latant Zakob ek dan latant Lea. Li al fouy osi dan latant de servant. Me li pa trouv nanye. Lerla li sorti dan latant Lea e li rant dan latant Rasel.
31.34: Rasel finn kasiet bann ti-stati la dan enn kousin ki met lor samo. Li pe asiz lor kousin la dan so latant. Laban fouy partou dan latant, me li pa trouv nanye.
31.35: Rasel dir so papa: “Pa bizin to ankoler si mo pa kapav leve pou montre twa mo respe. Mo pe gagn seki bann fam gagne.” Laban rod partou, me li pa trouv so bann ti-stati.
31.36: Lerla, Zakob ankoler e li dir Laban: “Ki mo finn fer demal? Ki krim mo finn fer pouki to pourswiv mwa koumsa?
31.37: To finn fouy dan tou mo bann zafer. Eski to finn trouv enn sel kitsoz ki pou twa? Met li la, divan tou bann dimoun. Zot ava deside ant mwa ek twa kisannla ena rezon.
31.38: Mo finn servi twa pandan 20 an. Zame to bann sev ek to bann mouton finn perdi zot piti. Zame mo pa finn manz enn sel belye dan to troupo.
31.39: Kan bebet sovaz ti touy enn zanimo, mo ti ranbours tou momem. Kan voler ti kokin zanimo, swa lizour swa aswar, to ti obliz mwa pou ranbourse.
31.40: Lizour mo ti pe soufer ar saler. Lanwit freser ti pe dominn mwa e mo pa ti mem kapav dormi.
31.41: Mo finn pas 20 an dan to lakaz. Mo finn travay 14 an pou kapav marye avek to de tifi, e sizan pou gagn enn troupo pou momem. Me twa, to finn sanz mo lapey dis fwa.
31.42: Gramersi Bondie mo granper Abraam, sa Bondie ki mo papa Izaak respekte la ti dan mo kote. Sinon, mo sir to ti pou fer mwa retourn lame vid. Bondie finn trouv mo soufrans. Li kone kouma mo finn travay dir. Akoz sa, yerswar li finn donn twa enn warning.”
31.43: Ler Zakob fini koze, Laban reponn: “Sa bann tifi la, zot pou mwa. Zot bann zanfan osi pou mwa. Tou sa bann mouton la pou mwa. Tou seki to trouve la pou mwa. Me apartir zordi, mo pou nepli kapav fer nanye pou mo bann tifi e pou zot bann zanfan.
31.44: Anou fer enn lalians, e anou met enn temwin ant twa ek mwa.”
31.45: Alor, Zakob pran enn long ros. Li met li dibout kouma enn kolonn.
31.46: Apre sa, li dir so bann zom amenn ros. Zot ramas ros e zot met ansam pou fer enn mel. Lerla, zot tou manze otour bann ros la.
31.47: Laban apel sa plas la Yegar-Sahadouta # 31:47 Dan langaz Laban, Yegar Sahadouta vedir “Mel ros ki Temwin.” , me Zakob apel li Galed # 31:47 An Ebre “Galed” vedir “Mel ros ki Temwin.” .
31.48: Apre sa, Laban dir: “Sa mel ros la enn temwin ant twa ek mwa zordi.” Akoz sa, zot apel li Galed.
31.49: Laban dir ankor: “LESEGNER pou vey nou konportman kan nou pou lwin ar nou kamarad.” Akoz sa, zot osi apel sa plas la Mispa # 31:49 Mispa vedir “stasion gardien.” .
31.50: Laban dir Zakob: “Fer atansion! Pa fer mo bann tifi soufer. Pa pran lezot fam. Sinon, pa avek zom ki to pou ena zafer, me avek Bondie, limem.”
31.51: Laban kontigne: “Get sa mel ros la ek sa stel ki mo finn drese la. Zot bann prev nou lalians.
31.52: Zot kouma bann temwin ant nou. Mo pa pou depas zot dan to direksion avek lintansion pou fer twa dimal. Twa osi to pa pou depas zot dan mo direksion avek lintansion pou fer mwa dimal.
31.53: Abraam, Nahor, ek zot bann anset ti ador mem Bondie. Limem pou Ziz ant nou.” Alor, Zakob fer enn serman lor nom Bondie ki so papa Izaak adore.
31.54: Lerla, li ofer enn sakrifis lor sa montagn la. Apre sa, li invit so bann dimoun pou enn repa. Kan zot fini manze, zot pas lanwit lor montagn la.

32.1: Landime gramatin, Laban lev boner. Li anbras so bann tifi ek so bann tizanfan e li dir zot orevwar. Lerla li retourn kot li # 32:1 Ena tradiksion met sa verse la dan sapit 31 verse 55. .
32.2: Zakob kontign so larout. Enn bann anz Bondie vinn zwenn li.
32.3: Kan Zakob trouv zot, li kontan, e li dir: “Ala larme Bondie!” Alor, li apel sa landrwa la Mahanaim # 32:3 Mahanaim vedir “de kan”. .
32.4: Zakob avoy bann mesaze divan li, kot so frer Ezai, dan Edom. Sa landrwa la trouv dan pei Seir.
32.5: Li donn zot sa mesaz la pou dir Ezai: “Ala seki to serviter Zakob dir twa: ‘Mo ti pe res kot Laban kouma enn etranze tou sa letan la. Asterla, mo finn desid pou retourne.
32.6: Mo posed bann troupo bef, bourik, mouton ek kabri. Mo ena osi serviter ek servant. Mo pe avoy twa sa mesaz la, mo segner, pouki to akeyir mwa avek bonte.’”
32.7: Bann mesaze la fer seki Zakob finn dir zot. Kan zot retourne, zot dir Zakob: “Nou sorti kot to frer Ezai. Li pe vinn zwenn twa avek 400 zom.”
32.8: Ler Zakob tann sa, li sezi ar laper. Li separ tou bann dimoun ki avek li ande group. Li separ osi tou so bann zanimo ande group.
32.9: Li dir: “Si Ezai atak enn group, kitfwa lot group la ava sape.”
32.10: Lerla Zakob priye: “A, Bondie mo granper Abraam ek mo papa Izaak. SEGNER, to ti dir mwa retourn dan mo pei, kot mo bann fami. To ti promet ki to pou protez mwa.
32.11: Mo pa merit sa gran lamour ek sa gran fidelite ki to finn ena anver mwa, to serviter. Kan mo ti travers larivier Zourdin, mo pa ti ena nanye apar mo baton. Zordi, mo pe retourne avek de gran group.
32.12: Mo sipliy twa, protez mwa kont mo frer Ezai, parski mo per li. Li kapav vinn touy nou tou, depi bann mama ziska bann zanfan.
32.13: Pourtan, to ti dir: ‘Mo pou fer seki bon pou twa. To bann desandan pou vinn boukou kouma disab dan bor lamer. Pa pou kapav kont zot, telman zot pou boukou.’”
32.14: Zakob pas lanwit dan sa plas la. Li swazir bann zanimo dan bann troupo ki li posede pou ofer Ezai enn kado.
32.15: Parmi, ena 200 sev ek 20 bouk, 200 mouton ek 20 belye,
32.16: femel samo ek zot piti ki ankor tet dile zot mama. Ena osi 40 vas ek 10 toro, 20 femel bourik ek 10 bourik mal.
32.17: Li separ bann zanimo la par group e li konfie zot so bann serviter. Li dir zot: “Pas divan mwa, e kit enn distans ant sak group.”
32.18: Lerla, li dir ek premie serviter la: “Kan mo frer Ezai pou zwenn twa, li pou oule kone ki twa, kot to pe ale. Li pou dimann twa pouki sannla sa bann zanimo ki divan twa la.
32.19: To bizin reponn li: ‘Sa bann zanimo la pou to serviter Zakob. Li finn avoy sa kouma enn kado pou mo segner Ezai. To serviter Zakob pe vini par deryer.’”
32.20: Li donn mem lord ek deziem, trwaziem, ek tou lezot serviter ki pe kondir bann troupo. Li dir zot: “Samem zot bizin dir Ezai kan zot zwenn li.
32.21: E zot bizin azoute: ‘To serviter Zakob pe vini par deryer.’” Zakob dir: “Kitfwa sa bann kado la pou apez so koler. Ler mo pou zwenn li fas-a-fas, kitfwa li pou akeyir mwa anbien.”
32.22: Alor, li avoy bann troupo la par divan. Me sa swar la, Zakob res dan kan.
32.25: Zakob res tousel e enn zom vinn lit avek li ziska lizour.
32.26: Kan sa zom la trouve ki li pa pou kapav gagne kont Zakob, li tap li lor so laans. Laans Zakob debwate.
32.27: Lerla, zom la dir Zakob: “Les mwa ale aster, parski lizour pe fer.” Me Zakob dir li: “Mo pa pou les twa ale tanki to pa beni mwa.”
32.28: Li dimann Zakob: “Kouma to apele?” Li reponn: “Zakob.”
32.29: Zom la dir li: “Asterla, to nom pou nepli Zakob. Pou apel twa Izrael # 32:29 An Ebre Izrael vedir “lit avek Bondie”. , parski to finn lit kont Bondie e kont bann zom, e to finn sorti vinker.”
32.30: Lerla, Zakob dir li: “Silteple, dir mwa kouma to apele.” Li dir Zakob: “Kifer to dimann mwa mo nom?” Lerla li beni Zakob.
32.31: Zakob dir: “Mo finn trouv Bondie fas-a-fas e mo ankor vivan.” Akoz sa, li apel sa landrwa la Penouel, ki vedir figir Bondie.
32.32: Soley pe leve, e Zakob travers kanal Penouel. Li mars bwate akoz so laans.
32.33: Ala kifer ziska zordi, bann Izraelit pa manz laser ki trouv lor laans bann zanimo. Akoz Zakob finn blese lor so laans.

33.1: Zakob lev lizie e li trouv Ezai pe vini avek 400 zom. Li diviz so bann zanfan ant Lea, Rasel ek de servant la.
33.2: Li fer de servant la ek zot bann zanfan mars divan. Lea ek so bann zanfan omilie e Rasel ek Zozef net deryer.
33.3: Zakob mars par divan zot tou. Li prostern li set fwa ziska ki li zwenn so frer.
33.4: Me Ezai galoupe vinn zwenn Zakob. Li may so likou e li anbras li. Lerla, toulede plore.
33.5: Kan Ezai lev latet, li trouv bann madam ek bann zanfan pe vini. Li dimann Zakob: “Ki sannla sa bann dimoun ki pe akonpagn twa la?” Zakob reponn: “Bann zanfan ki Bondie finn akord mwa, to serviter.”
33.6: Anmemtan, bann servant ek zot bann zanfan arive. Zot prostern divan Ezai.
33.7: Apre sa, Lea ek so bann zanfan arive e zot fer parey. Rasel ek Zozef ariv andernie e zot osi prosterne.
33.8: Lerla, Ezai dimann Zakob: “Kifer to finn avoy tou sa bann troupo ki mo finn zwenn lor sime la?” Zakob reponn: “Mo finn avoy sa pou gagn to faver, mo segner.”
33.9: Me Ezai dir li: “Momem mo ena ase, mo frer. Gard seki pou twa.”
33.10: Zakob reponn: “Non, mo sipliy twa. Si vremem to finn pardonn mwa, aksepte mo kado. Kan mo finn zwenn twa, koumadir mo finn zwenn Bondie, telman to finn akeyir mwa ek enn gran bonte.
33.11: Fer mwa plezir, aksepte mo kado. Bondie finn beni mwa, e mo ena tou seki mo bizin.” Zakob kontigne insiste. Finalman, Ezai aksepte so kado.
33.12: Lerla, Ezai dir: “Anou repran larout. Mo pou akonpagn twa.”
33.13: Me Zakob reponn: “Mo segner, to kone ki bann zanfan frel. Anplis, mo bizin okip bann zanimo ki ankor tete ek zot mama. Si zot mars tro boukou dan enn zourne, zot pou mor.
33.14: Ale twa, mo segner. Mwa, mo pou pran letan ki bizin akoz mo bann troupo ek mo bann zanfan, ziska mo zwenn twa dan Seir.”
33.15: Ezai dir li: “Les mo kit de-trwa mo bann zom avek twa.” Me Zakob reponn: “Pa gagn traka, li pa neseser. To lakey deza enn gran zafer pou mwa.”
33.16: Alor, Ezai pran larout pou retourn kot li dan Seir.
33.17: Me Zakob al Soukot. Li fer aranz enn lakaz laba. Li fer aranz osi bann park lapay pou so troupo. Akoz sa, li apel sa landrwa la Soukot, seki vedir Kabann.
33.18: Zakob finn fer enn vwayaz depi Padann-Aram. Li ariv sin e sof dan Sikem, enn lavil dan pei Kanaan. Li kanpe pre ar lavil.
33.19: Sa terin kot li pe kanpe la pou bann zanfan Amor, fondater Sikem. Li aste terin la avek zot pou 100 pies larzan.
33.20: Li aranz enn lotel dan sa landrwa la e li apel li El-Elohe-Israel # 33:20 El-Elohe-Israel vedir “Bondie, li Bondie Izrael”. .

34.1: Enn zour, Dina, tifi Zakob ek Lea, sorti pou al rann vizit bann zennfi dan lavil.
34.2: Amor, enn sef Ivit dan sa landrwa la, ena enn garson ki apel Sikem. Kan Sikem trouv Dina, li trap li e li viol li.
34.3: Sikem tom amoure ek Dina e li dir li bann zoli parol pou gagn so leker.
34.4: Lerla, Sikem al koz avek so papa Amor, e dir li: “Fer mwa marye avek sa tifi la.”
34.5: Zakob tande ki Sikem finn dezonor so tifi Dina. Me li pa fer nanye, parski so bann garson pa la. Zot avek bann troupo dan patiraz. Zakob prefer atann zot retourne.
34.6: Amor avek so garson Sikem vinn kot Zakob pou koz avek li.
34.7: Zis dan sa ler la, bann garson Zakob rant lakaz. Kan zot tann sa nouvel la zot bwi ar koler. Seki Sikem finn fer avek Dina finn sali loner bann zanfan Izrael. Li pa ti bizin fer enn zafer koumsa.
34.8: Me Amor koz avek zot e dir zot: “Leker mo garson Sikem finn atase avek sa tifi la. Mo sipliy zot, les li marye avek li.
34.9: Anou tom dakor ansam. Les nou bann tifi ek nou bann garson marye ant zot.
34.10: Zot ava res parmi nou. Nou pei pou ouver pou zot. Zot pou kapav reste, fer komers, e vinn propriyeter.”
34.11: Lerla, Sikem pran laparol e li dir: “Fer mwa sa faver la, e mo pou donn zot tou seki zot dimann mwa.
34.12: Dir mwa komie mo bizin peye, e ki kado zot anvi gagne. Mo pou donn zot tou seki zot dimande. Me, silvouple, donn mwa lame Dina.”
34.13: Bann zanfan Zakob desid pou met Sikem ek so papa dan enn piez. Zot pa kontan akoz Sikem finn sali loner zot ser.
34.14: Alor, zot reponn: “Nou pa kapav fer sa. Li pa posib fer nou ser marye ar kikenn ki pa sirkonsi. Sa pou enn dezoner pou nou.
34.15: Nou pou aksepte zis lor enn sel kondision: Zot bizin fer kouma nou, e tou bann mal kot zot bizin sirkonsi.
34.16: Lerla, nou bann zanfan ava marye ant zot. Nou ava res parmi zot, e nou ava form enn sel lepep.
34.17: Me, si zot pa aksepte nou propozision, nou pou al repran nou ser.”
34.18: Sa bann parol la fer plezir Amor ek so garson Sikem.
34.19: Sikem enn dimoun bien respekte dan so klan. Li pa perdi letan pou fer seki bizin, parski li bien amoure avek tifi Zakob.
34.20: Sikem ek so papa Amor desid pou al koz avek bann zom lor laplas kot laport lavil. Zot dir:
34.21: “Sa bann dimoun la korek avek nou. Les zot res dan nou pei e fer komers. Ena ase plas dan nou pei pou zot. Nou ava kapav marye ar zot bann tifi, e nou ava fer nou bann tifi marye avek zot.
34.22: Zot dakor pou viv parmi nou e vinn enn sel lepep avek nou. Me zot finn met enn sel kondision: Tou bann mal parmi nou bizin sirkonsi kouma zot.
34.23: Si nou donn zot nou lakor, zot pou vinn res parmi nou. Lerla, eski tou zot bann troupo ek tou seki zot posede pa pou vinn pou nou?”
34.24: Tou seki prezan kot laport lavil aksepte propozision Amor ek so garson Sikem. Tou bann zom dan lavil sirkonsi.
34.25: De zour plitar, bann zom lavil Sikem ankor ena douler. De parmi bann garson Zakob, Simeon ek Levi, bann frer Dina, profit lokazion. Zot pran zot lepe e zot rant trankil dan lavil. Lerla, zot masakre tou bann zom.
34.26: Zot touy osi Amor ek so garson Sikem ar zot lepe. Apre sa, zot pran Dina dan lakaz Sikem e zot ale.
34.27: Bann lezot garson Zakob vinn pran bann lobze valer ki lor bann kadav. Zot pran tou bann rises dan lavil, parski finn dezonor zot ser.
34.28: Zot pran tou bann mouton ek bann sev, bann bef ek bann bourik. Zot pran tou seki dan lavil ek dan bann plantasion andeor lavil.
34.29: Zot amenn tou bann rises, ansam ek bann fam ek bann zanfan. Zot pran tou seki ena dan bann lakaz.
34.30: Kan bannla retourn kot zot, Zakob dir Simeon ek Levi: “Ki zot finn fer? Zot finn met mwa dan problem. Aster, bann abitan dan sa rezion la, bann Kananeen ek bann Perizit pou deteste mwa. Zot pou fer lalians e zot pou vinn atak mwa. Zot pou fini mwa ek tou mo fami, parski nou pena boukou zom.”
34.31: Lerla, so bann garson reponn: “Eski sa boug la ti gagn drwa tret nou ser kouma enn prostitie?”

35.1: Bondie dir Zakob: “Leve! Al Betel e res laba. To ava aranz enn lotel pou mwa laba, parski labamem mo ti aparet avek twa, kan to ti pe sove akoz to frer Ezai.”
35.2: Zakob rasanble so fami ek tou seki avek li. Li dir zot: “Debaras tou bann idol ki ena kot zot. Apre sa, bengn zot e sanz zot linz.
35.3: Prepar zot pou nou al Betel. Mo pou aranz enn lotel pou Bondie laba. Limem ti reponn mwa kan mo ti dan problem. Li finn akonpagn mwa partou kot mo finn ale.”
35.4: Alor, zot donn Zakob tou bann idol ki zot ena kot zot. Zot donn li osi bann zanon ki dan zot zorey. Zakob anter tousala anba enn gran pie, pre ar lavil Sikem.
35.5: Zakob ek so fami pran larout. Anmemtan, Bondie avoy enn gran laper lor bann abitan lezot lavil dan lezanviron. Personn pa oze pourswiv zot.
35.6: Zakob ek tou seki avek li ariv Louz, setadir Betel, dan Kanaan.
35.7: Li aranz enn lotel laba. Li apel sa plas la El-Betel, ki vedir Bondie Betel. Labamem, Bondie ti aparet avek li kan li ti pe sove akoz so frer.
35.8: Dan sa mem letan la, Debora, nouris Rebeka, mor. Zot anter li anba enn gran-pie, pre ar Betel. Depi sa, zot apel sa landrwa la Alonn Bakout, ki vedir pie larm.
35.9: Kan Zakob sorti Padann-Aram, Bondie paret avek li ankor enn fwa, e beni li.
35.10: Li dir Zakob: “To nom Zakob. Me, pou nepli apel twa Zakob. Asterla, to nom pou Izrael.” Alor, Bondie apel li Izrael.
35.11: Bondie dir li: “Momem Bondie Toupwisan, Mo pou donn twa boukou zanfan. To pou vinn anset enn gran nasion, e mem plizir nasion. Pou ena bann lerwa parmi to bann desandan.
35.12: Pei ki mo ti donn Abraam ek Izaak, mo donn twa li. Plitar, apre twa, mo pou donn to bann desandan pei la.”
35.13: Apre sa, Bondie kit plas kot li finn koz avek Zakob e li ale.
35.14: Zakob dres enn ros laba, dan plas ki Bondie finn koz avek li. Li vers enn lofrand divin ek delwil lor ros la.
35.15: Zakob apel sa plas la Betel, seki vedir lakaz Bondie, parski labamem Bondie finn koz avek li.
35.16: Zakob ek so fami kit Betel. Zot ankor enn bon distans ek Efrata kan ler vini pou Rasel akouse. So lakousman bien dir.
35.17: Letan li pe soufer boukou pou akouse, so sazfam dir li: “Pa trakase, to pe gagn ankor enn garson.”
35.18: Lavi Rasel pe kit li. Me avan li mor, li apel zanfan la Ben-Oni, savedir garson maler. Me Zakob apel li Benzamin, savedir garson lame drwat.
35.19: Rasel perdi so lavi apre so lakousman. Zakob anter li pre ar larout ki al Efrata, ki zordi apel Betleem.
35.20: Zakob dres enn ros lor tom Rasel. Ziska zordi ankor apel li ros tom Rasel.
35.21: Zakob, ki osi apel Izrael, kontign so vwayaz. Li kanp lot kote Midal-Eder, savedir latour berze.
35.22: Izrael ankor pe res dan sa pei la kan Riben gagn relasion ek Bila, fam so papa. Izrael gagn sa nouvel la.
35.23: Zakob ena 12 garson. Avek Lea li finn gagn sis garson: Riben, so premie-ne, Simeon, Levi, Zida, Isakar, ek Zabilon.
35.24: Rasel finn donn li de garson: Zozef ek Benzamin.
35.25: Bila, servant Rasel, finn donn li de garson: Dan ek Neftali.
35.26: Avek Zilpa, servant Lea, Zakob finn gagn de garson: Gad ek Aser. Samem lalis bann garson Zakob. Zot finn ne dan Padann-Aram.
35.27: Zakob vinn kot so papa Izaak dan Mamre, pre ar Kiriat-Arba. Sa lavil la zordi apel Ebron. Labamem, Abraam ek Izaak, ti reste.

36.1: Ala nom bann zanfan Ezai; so nom gate Edom.
36.2: Ezai marye avek de fam Kananeenn. Enn apel Ada, tifi Elon, enn Itit. Lot la apel Oholibama, tifi Ana. So granper apel Sibeon, enn Ivit.
36.3: Ezai marye osi avek Basmat, ser Nebayot e tifi Ismael.
36.4: Ada gagn Elifaz, e Basmat gagn Reouel.
36.5: Oholibama ena trwa zanfan: Yeous, Yalam, ek Kora. Sa bann zanfan Ezai, e zot tou finn ne dan pei Kanaan.
36.6: Enn zour, Ezai pran so trwa fam, so bann zanfan, so bann serviter ek servant. Li pran osi tou so bann zanimo, ek tou so rises ki li ena dan Kanaan. Li al res dan enn lot landrwa, lwin ar so frer Zakob.
36.7: Ezai ek so frer Zakob nepli kapav res ansam dan mem landrwa, telman zot ena boukou dibien. Landrwa la tro tipti pou nouri zot bann troupo.
36.8: Alor, Ezai, setadir Edom, al res lor bann kolinn Seir.
36.9: Ala lalis bann desandan Ezai, anset bann Edomit ki res lor bann kolinn Seir.
36.10: Ezai ek so fam Ada gagn enn garson ki apel Elifaz. Avek so lot fam Basmat li gagn Reouel.
36.11: Bann garson Elifaz apel Temann, Omar, Sefo, Gatam, ek Kenaz.
36.12: Elifaz ena enn metres ki apel Timna. Li donn Elifaz enn zanfan ki apel Amalek. Sa bann la bann desandan Ada, fam Ezai.
36.13: Bann garson Reouel apel Nahat, Zera, Sama, ek Miza. Zot bann desandan Basmat ek Ezai.
36.14: Oholibama, tifi Ana ek tizanfan Zibeon, donn Ezai trwa zanfan: Yeous, Yalam ek Kora.
36.17: Ezai ek so fam Basmat ena enn garson ki apel Reouel. Bann garson Reouel ki finn vinn sef klan apel Nahat, Zera, Sama, ek Miza. Zot osi zot res dan Edom.
36.18: Sef Yeous, sef Yalam, ek sef Kora, zot bann garson Ezai ek Oholibama, tifi Ana.
36.19: Tousala bann sef Edomit, bann desandan Ezai.
36.22: Bann garson Lotann apel Hori ek Emam. Ser Lotann apel Timna.
36.23: Bann garson Sobal apel Alvann, Manaat, Ebal, Sefo, ek Onam.
36.24: Bann garson Sibeon apel Aya ek Ana. Ana mem ki ti dekouver dilo dan dezer kan li ti pe vey troupo so papa Sibeon.
36.25: Ana ena enn garson ek enn tifi. Garson la apel Disonn, e tifi la apel Oholibama.
36.26: Bann garson Disonn apel Emdann, Esbann, Itrann, ek Kerann.
36.27: Bann garson Eser apel Bilann, Zavann, ek Akann.
36.28: Ous ek Arann, zot bann garson Disann.
36.31: Ala nom bann lerwa ki finn regn lor Edom, avan mem ki ti ena lerwa dan Izrael:
36.32: Bela, garson Beor, ki sorti lavil Dinaba.
36.33: Kan Bela mor, Yobab vinn lerwa dan so plas. Yobab garson Zera, e li sorti lavil Bosra.
36.34: Kan Yobab mor, Housann, enn Temanit vinn lerwa.
36.35: Housann mor e Hadad, garson Bedad, vinn lerwa. So lavil apel Avit. Limem finn bat bann Madianit dan pei Moab.
36.36: Kan Hadad mor, Samla, ki sorti Masreka, vinn lerwa dan so plas.
36.37: Apre lamor Samla, Saoul vinn lerwa dan so plas. Li sorti Reobot, kote larivier Efrat.
36.38: Kan Saoul mor, Baal-Hanann, garson Akbor, vinn lerwa dan so plas.
36.39: Baal-Hanann, garson Akbor, mor e Adar vinn lerwa dan so plas. Adar sorti lavil Paou. So fam apel Metabeel, tifi Matred e tizanfan Me-Zahad.
36.40: Ala lalis bann sef Edomit dapre zot klan ek zot landrwa: Timna, Alva, Yetet,
36.43: Magdiel, ek Iram. Sa bann la bann sef Edomit. Sakenn res dan enn diferan landrwa dan pei. Ezai anset bann Edomit.

37.1: Zakob res Kanaan, pei kot so papa ti finn imigre.
37.2: Ala zistwar bann garson Zakob. Sa lepok la, Zozef ena 17 an. Li vey troupo avek so bann frer, bann garson Bila ek Zilpa, bann fam so papa. Zozef abitie vinn raport so bann frer ar so papa.
37.3: Izrael kontan Zozef plis ki so bann lezot garson, parski li finn gagn Zozef dan so vie zour. Li fer koud enn zoli manto pou Zozef.
37.4: So bann frer remarke ki zot papa kontan li plis ki zot. Akoz sa, zot ayir li, e zot nepli kapav koz bien ar li.
37.5: Enn zour, Zozef fer enn rev. Kan li rakont so bann frer sa rev la, zot pli pa kontan li.
37.7: Nou tou ti dan karo pou rekolt. Nou ti pe atas bann lapay dible ansam. Enn sel kou, mo ta lapay ti dres anler. Lerla, seki pou zot ti vinn otour li, e ti prostern divan li.”
37.8: So bann frer dir li: “Eski to ena lintansion pou vinn nou lerwa? Eski to oule dominn lor nou?” Zot deteste li plis ankor, akoz manier ki li rakont zot so rev.
37.9: Enn lot zour, Zozef fer enn lot rev. Li rakont rev la so bann frer: “Mo finn fer enn lot rev. Dan mo rev, soley, lalinn ek 11 zetwal ti pe prostern divan mwa.”
37.10: Lerla, li rakont sa rev la so papa osi. Me so papa repros li. Li dir li: “Ki sa rev la vedir? Eski vremem mwa, to mama ek to bann frer pou bizin vinn prostern divan twa?”
37.11: Alor, so bann frer zalou li, me so papa repans sa rev la souvan.
37.12: Bann frer Zozef finn amenn bann troupo zot papa dan patiraz, pre ar Sikem.
37.13: Izrael dir Zozef: “To bann frer pe vey troupo pre Sikem. Prepar twa pou al get zot.” Zozef reponn: “Wi papa!”
37.14: Zakob dir li: “Al gete si to bann frer bien, e si tou zanimo korek. Apre, to vinn fer mwa kone.” Lerla, Zakob fer li ale. Zozef kit vale Ebron pou pran larout.
37.15: Kan li ariv dan Sikem, li rod so bann frer dan bann patiraz. Enn zom trouv li e dimann li: “Ki to pe rode?”
37.16: Li reponn: “Mo pe rod mo bann frer ki pe vey troupo. Silteple, dir mwa kot zot ete.”
37.17: Zom la dir li: “Zot finn deplase. Mo ti tann zot dir ki zot ti pe al Dotann.” Alor, Zozef al rod so bann frer, e li trouv zot dan Dotann.
37.18: Zot trouv li pe vini delwin. Me avan ki Zozef zwenn zot, zot konplote pou touy li.
37.19: Zot dir ant zotmem: “Ala rever la pe vini.
37.20: Anou touy li, e anou zet so lekor dan enn pwi. Nou ava dir ki enn zanimo sovaz finn devor li. Lerla, nou ava gete si so rev vinn realite.”
37.21: Kan Riben tann sa, li rod enn fason pou sap lavi Zozef. Li dir zot: “Pa bizin tir so lavi.
37.22: Pa bizin vers so disan. Zet li dan enn pwi par la, dan dezer. Me pa lev lame lor li.” Riben dir sa parski li ena lintansion pou liber Zozef e fer li retourn kot so papa.
37.23: Alor, kan Zozef ariv avek zot, zot trap li e zot tir so zoli manto lor li.
37.24: Lerla, zot zet li dan enn pwi sek.
37.25: Apre sa, zot asize pou zot manze. Pandan ki zot pe manze, zot trouv enn group marsan Ismaelit pe pase. Bannla sorti Galaad e zot pe al Lezip. Zot bann samo pe sarye bann prodwi parfime, lagom ek lamir.
37.26: Lerlamem, Zida dir so bann frer: “Ki profi nou pou gagne si nou touy nou frer e kasiet so lamor?
37.27: Pa bizin nou lev lame lor li. Malgre tou, li nou frer ek nou disan. Anou vann li plito avek bann Ismaelit.” Tou so bann frer dakor.
37.28: Enn bann marsan Madianit pas par la. Zot tir Zozef dan pwi e zot vann li avek bann Ismaelit pou 20 pies larzan. Bann marsan la amenn Zozef dan Lezip.
37.29: Plitar, kan Riben al get Zozef dan pwi, li nepli la. Riben dezespere e li desir so linz.
37.30: Lerla, li real zwenn so bann frer, e li dir zot: “Piti la nepli la; ki mo pou fer aster?”
37.31: Alor, zot pran manto Zozef, zot egorz enn kabri, e zot tranp manto la dan so disan.
37.32: Lerla, zot fer amenn manto la kot zot papa, e zot fer dir li: “Ala seki nou finn trouve. Gete si manto to garson sa, oubien non.”
37.33: Zakob rekonet manto Zozef e li dir: “Samem manto mo garson. Enn zanimo sovaz finn devor li.”
37.34: Lerla, Zakob desir so linz e atas enn sak dan so lerin. Li plor lamor so garson pandan lontan.
37.35: Tou so bann zanfan vinn konsol li, me li pa konsole. Okontrer, li dir: “Mo pou mor dan mo dey e mo pou al zwenn mo garson dan landrwa kot bann mor ale.” Alor, li kontign plore.
37.36: Pandan sa letan la, bann Madianit finn amenn Zozef dan Lezip. Zot vann li avek Potifar, enn gran ofisie Faraon. Potifar mem komandan gard rwayal.

38.1: Sa lepok la, Zida kit so bann frer e li al res Adoulam kot enn zom ki apel Ira.
38.2: Laba, Zida zwenn tifi enn Kananeen ki apel Soua. Zida marye avek li e zot gagn relasion.
38.3: Fam la tom ansint e li gagn enn garson. Zida apel li Er.
38.4: Apre sa, fam Zida gagn enn deziem garson ki li apel Onann.
38.5: Li tom ansint enn trwaziem fwa, e li gagn ankor enn garson. Li apel li Sela. Zida ti finn al Kezib kan Sela ne.
38.6: Plitar, Zida marye so premie garson, Er, avek enn zennfi ki apel Tamar.
38.7: Me Er fer move divan LESEGNER, e LESEGNER pran so lavi.
38.8: Lerla, Zida dir Onann: “Fer dapre koutim e marye avek vev to gran-frer. Donn li enn desandan.”
38.9: Me Onann kone ki zanfan la pa pou konsidere kouma so prop zanfan. Ala kifer, sakfwa li dormi avek so belser, li les so semans tom anba. Li panvi donn so frer enn desandan.
38.10: LESEGNER pa kontan so konportman. Alor, li pran so lavi osi.
38.11: Lerla, Zida dir so belfi Tamar: “To vev pou deziem fwa asterla. Al res lakaz to papa ziska ki mo garson Sela vinn gran.” Anverite, Zida per tansion so garson Sela osi mor, parey kouma so de gran-frer. Alor, Tamar al res lakaz so papa.
38.12: Apre inpe letan, fam Zida, tifi Soua, mor. Kan Zida fini fer so dey, li desid pou al Timna. Laba, so bann zom pe tir lalenn lor so bann mouton. So kamarad Hira, ki sorti Adoulam, akonpagn li.
38.13: Tamar gagn nouvel ki so boper pe mont Timna pou tir lalenn lor so bann mouton.
38.14: Li realize ki Sela finn vinn enn zom. Me Zida pa finn fer li marye avek li. Alor, Tamar anlev so linz vev e li abiy enn lot manier. Li met enn vwal lor so latet. Lerla, li al asiz dan lantre Enaim ki lor larout Timna.
38.15: Zida trouv Tamar e li panse enn prostitie. Li pa rekonet li akoz so vwal.
38.16: Zida pa kone si so belfi sa. Li apros ar li dan bor sime, e li dir li: “Anou ale, mo anvi dormi avek twa.” Tamar dir li: “Ki to pou donn mwa anretour?”
38.17: Zida reponn: “Mo ava donn twa enn kabri dan mo troupo.” Tamar dir li: “Mo dakor, me donn mwa enn garanti ziska ki mo gagn kabri la.”
38.18: Zida dimann li: “Ki garanti to anvi mo donn twa?” Li reponn: “To stanp ek so lakord ki dan to likou, ek baton ki dan to lame.” Li aksepte pou donn li. Lerla, zot dormi ansam e Tamar tom ansint pou li.
38.19: Apre sa, Tamar retourn kot li. Li tir so vwal e li remet so linz vev.
38.20: Zida fer so kamarad Adoulamit amenn kabri ki li finn promet fam la. Koumsa, li pou kapav repran so bann lobze. Me so kamarad pa trouv personn laba.
38.21: Li dimann bann dimoun dan vilaz: “Kot sa prostitie ki ti pe asize dan bor sime laba la?” Zot reponn: “Zame finn ena prostitie isi.”
38.22: Lerla, li retourn kot Zida e li dir li: “Mo pa finn trouv li. Anplis, bann dimoun dan landrwa finn dir mwa ki zame pa ti ena prostitie laba.”
38.23: Zida dir li: “Les tonbe! Les li gard bann lobze la. Sinon, dimoun pou kapav fer palab lor nou. Antouka, mo finn avoy so kabri, me to pa finn trouv li.”
38.24: Trwa mwa pli tar, kikenn vinn dir Zida: “To belfi finn fer prostitision e li finn tom ansint.” Zida donn lord: “Amenn li deor e bril li vivan.”
38.25: Letan zot pe amenn Tamar, li fer dir so boper: “Get sa stanp la ek so lakord ek sa baton la. Ki sannla zot propriyeter? Sa zom ki finn donn mwa sa bann lobze la, limem finn fer mwa ansint.”
38.26: Zida rekonet so bann lobze, e li dir: “Li finn respekte lalwa pli bien ki mwa. Mo ti bizin fer li marye avek mo garson Sela. Me mo pa finn fer li.” Zida zame pa ti dormi avek li ankor.
38.27: Kan letan vini pou Tamar akouse, dekouver ki ena zimo dan so vant.
38.28: Enn ladan tir so lame deor. Sazfam la atas enn lakord rouz dan so pwagne. Lerla li dir: “Limem premie-ne.”
38.29: Me baba la remet so lame andan. Lerla, so frer ne avan li. Sazfam la dir: “To bien konn prepar to pasaz!” Alor, Zida apel zanfan la Peres, ki vedir pasaz.
38.30: Apre sa, seki ena lakord rouz dan so pwagne la ne. Zida apel li Zera.

39.1: Bann Ismaelit finn amenn Zozef dan Lezip. Zot vann li avek enn Ezipsien ki apel Potifar. Potifar enn ofisie inportan pou Faraon. Limem Komandan gard rwayal.
39.2: LESEGNER avek Zozef, e li reysi dan tou seki li fer. So met fer li res dan so prop lakaz.
39.3: Potifar remarke ki LESEGNER finn beni Zozef. Li reysi dan tou seki li fer.
39.4: Alor, Potifar fer bon anver Zozef. Li fer li vinn so administrater. Li met li ansarz so lakaz ek tou so dibien.
39.5: Depi sa, LESEGNER beni Potifar e li prospere akoz Zozef. Benediksion LESEGNER lor tou seki li posede, dan so lakaz kouma dan so plantasion.
39.6: Potifar met tou so dibien dan lame Zozef. Li nepli bizin okip nanye, sof so prop manze. Zozef enn zoli garson.
39.7: Apre inpe letan, fam potifar koumans atire ar li. Li dir Zozef: “Vinn dormi avek mwa!”
39.8: Zozef refize e dir li: “Mo pa kapav fer sa. Mo met ena konfians ar mwa. Li finn donn mwa kontrol lor tou so dibien. Aster li pena pou okip nanye.
39.9: Personn pena plis lotorite ki mwa dan sa lakaz la. Mo met finn permet mwa fer tou, sof tous twa, parski to so fam. Mo pa pou kapav komet enn lemal parey. Mo pa pou fer enn pese koumsa divan Bondie.”
39.10: Fam Potifar kontigne sedwir Zozef toulezour. Me Zozef pa sede; li refiz dormi avek li.
39.11: Enn zour, Zozef rant dan lakaz pou fer so travay. Pena okenn domestik dan lakaz sa ler la.
39.12: Fam Potifar trap li par so linz e dir li: “Dormi avek mwa.” Me Zozef kit so linz dan lame fam potifar, e li galoup deor.
39.13: Fam la remarke ki Zozef finn sove e finn kit so linz dan so lame.
39.14: Alor, li apel tou so bann domestik e li dir zot: “Get enn kou! Mo mari finn amenn enn Ebre isi pou mank nou direspe. Li finn vinn isi pou viol mwa. Me mo finn kriye for.
39.15: Kan li finn tann mwa kriye sekour, li finn kit so linz lamem e li finn galoup deor.”
39.16: Lerla, li gard linz Zozef avek li ziska ki so mari retourn lakaz.
39.17: Li rakont so mari mem zistwar: “Sa serviter Ebre ki to finn amene la finn rant isi pou viol mwa.
39.18: Me kan mo finn kriye for, li finn kit so linz lamem e li finn galoup deor.”
39.19: Kan Potifar tann sa, li bien ankoler.
39.20: Li fer aret Zozef e met li dan prizon kot ferm bann prizonie lerwa. Zozef res dan sa prizon la.
39.21: LESEGNER avek Zozef e li montre li so gran lamour. Li fer li gagn faver sef gard prizon.
39.22: Sef la donn Zozef responsabilite tou bann lezot prizonie. Limem diriz tou bann travay ki bann prizonie bizin fer.
39.23: Sef la nepli bizin okip bann travay ki li konfie Zozef. LESEGNER avek Zozef e li reysi dan tou seki li fer.

40.3: Li fer met zot dan prizon kot so komandan gard rwayal. Dan sa prizon lamem Zozef ti ete.
40.4: Komandan gard rwayal konfie Zozef sa de prizonie la. Zozef vey lor zot bienet. Zot res dan prizon pou inpe letan.
40.5: Enn swar, serviter ki servi lerwa so labwason ek sef boulanze Faraon, toulede fer enn rev. Sak rev ena enn sinifikasion.
40.6: Gramatin, kan Zozef vinn get zot, li trouv zot dan traka.
40.7: Li dimann zot: “Kifer zot paret trakase koumsa zordi?”
40.8: Zot reponn li: “Nou finn fer sakenn enn rev. Pena personn isi ki kapav explik nou sa bann rev la.” Zozef dir zot: “Bondie ki donn konesans pou interpret rev. Pa per! Rakont mwa zot rev.”
40.9: Alor, serviter ki servi lerwa so labwason rakont Zozef so rev: “Dan mo rev, ti ena enn pie rezin divan mwa.
40.10: Pie rezin la ti ena trwa brans. Kouma li ti koumans bourzone li ti anfler. Bann fler la finn raport bann grap rezin mir.
40.11: Koup Faraon ti dan mo lame. Mo ti kas bann grap rezin e mo ti pers zot zi dan koup la. Lerla, mo finn met koup la dan lame Faraon.”
40.12: Alor, Zozef dir li: “Ala seki to rev vedir: Trwa brans la reprezant trwa zour.
40.13: Dan trwa zour Faraon pou relev to latet. Li pou redonn twa to travay. Lerla, to pou kapav servi li so divin, parey kouma to ti pe fer avan.
40.14: Silteple, pa bliye mwa kan to pou dan bien. Koz mwa avek Faraon, pouki mo sorti dan sa prizon la.
40.15: Bann dimoun finn anlev mwa lor later bann Ebre. Zot finn amenn mwa isi par lafors. Mem isi mo pa finn fer nanye ki merit prizon.”
40.16: Kan sef boulanze trouve ki Zozef finn interpret rev la bien, li dir li: “Mwa osi mo finn fer enn rev. Dan mo rev, mo ti pe sarye trwa panie gato lor mo latet.
40.17: Dan panie ki ti pli lao la, ti ena bann bon gato ki Faraon kontan. Me bann zwazo ti pe manz zot lor mo latet.”
40.18: Zozef dir li: “Ala seki to rev vedir: Trwa panie la reprezant trwa zour.
40.19: Dan trwa zour Faraon pou fer lev twa anler. Li pou fer pandi twa lor enn pie. Bann votour pou vinn manz to laser.”
40.20: Trwa zour plitar, Faraon fet so laniverser. Li organiz enn gran repa pou tou so bann ofisie. Dan zot prezans, li fer amenn so de serviter e li donn sakenn enn pozision diferan.
40.21: Serviter ki responsab pou servi li so labwason regagn so travay. Li rekoumans donn lerwa so koup divin.
40.22: Me lerwa fer pandi so sef boulanze. Tou arive parey kouma Zozef ti dir.
40.23: Pourtan, serviter ki responsab pou servi labwason lerwa la finn bliye Zozef.

41.1: Dezan plitar, Faraon fer enn rev. Dan so rev, li pe diboute dan bor larivier Nil.
41.2: Li trouv set zoli vas bien gra sorti dan Nil. Zot vinn manz lerb ver dan bor larivier.
41.3: Lerla, set vilin vas, bien meg, sorti dan Nil. Zot koste ar bann zoli vas gra la dan bor larivier.
41.4: Bann vilin vas meg la manz bann zoli vas gra la. Lerlamem, somey Faraon kase.
41.5: Faraon regagn somey e li fer enn deziem rev. Sann fwa la, Faraon trouv set gro zepi dible bien garni pe devlope dan enn brans.
41.6: Lerla, li trouv set lot zepi sorti. Zot paret pati e brile ar divan dezer.
41.7: Sa set ti zepi pati la, manz sa set gro zepi bien garni la. Lerlamem, somey Faraon kase enn deziem fwa. Li realize ki li ti pe reve.
41.8: Landime gramatin, latet Faraon fatige. Alor, li fer apel tou bann mazisien ek bann saz dan Lezip. Li rakont zot so bann rev. Me personn pa kapav explik li bann rev la.
41.9: Lerlamem, serviter ki responsab pou servi Faraon so labwason dir li: “Mazeste, zordi mo rapel erer ki mo ti fer.
41.10: Enn zour to ti ankoler ar sef boulanze ek mwa. To ti fer met nou dan prizon kot komandan gard rwayal.
41.11: Enn swar, nou toulede ti fer enn rev. Sak rev ti ena so prop sinifikasion.
41.12: Enn zenn Ebre ti avek nou dan prizon. Li ti serviter komandan gard rwayal. Nou ti rakont li nou rev, e li ti donn sakenn so sinifikasion.
41.13: Tou ti pase parey kouma li ti dir nou: Mwa, mo finn regagn mo travay, e sef boulanze finn pandi.”
41.14: Faraon fer al sers Zozef. Zot degaze tir li dan prizon. Li raze e li sanz so linz. Lerla, zot amenn li divan Faraon.
41.15: Faraon dir li: “Mo finn fer enn bann rev. Personn pa finn kapav interpret zot. Mo finn tann dir ki to kapav interpret rev.”
41.16: Zozef dir Faraon: “Pa mwa Mazeste, me Bondie ki pou donn twa enn bon explikasion.”
41.17: Faraon dir Zozef: “Dan mo rev, mo ti pe diboute dan bor larivier Nil.
41.18: Mo ti trouv set zoli vas bien gra sorti dan Nil. Zot ti vinn manz lerb ver dan bor larivier.
41.19: Lerla set vilin vas, bien meg, ti sorti dan Nil. Zame mo finn trouv bann vas vilin koumsa dan Lezip antie.
41.20: Sa set vilin vas meg la ti devor sa set zoli vas gra la.
41.21: Me personn pa ti pou dir ki zot finn fer sa, parski zot ti res meg kouma avan. Lerlamem, mo somey ti kase.
41.22: Kan mo ti redormi, mo ti fer enn deziem rev. Sann fwa la, mo ti trouv set zoli zepi dible bien garni ki ti pe devlope lor enn brans.
41.23: Lerla, set ti zepi pati, brile ar divan dezer ti pous deryer zot.
41.24: Bann ti zepi la ti aval bann gro zepi bien garni la. Mo finn rakont bann mazisien mo bann rev. Me personn pa finn kapav explik mwa bann rev la.”
41.25: Lerla Zozef dir Faraon: “Mazeste, to de rev ena mem sinifikasion. Atraver to bann rev, Bondie finn fer twa kone anavans seki li pou fer.
41.26: Sa set zoli vas la ek sa set zoli zepi la, reprezant set lane. Toulede rev parey e zot form enn sel.
41.27: Sa set vilin vas meg la ek sa set ti zepi pati e brile ar divan dezer la osi reprezant set lane. Me set lane lasesres.
41.28: Kouma mo finn dir twa, Mazeste, Bondie finn fer twa kone anavans seki li pou fer.
41.29: Dan sa set lane ki pe vini la, pou ena labondans partou dan Lezip.
41.30: Apre sa, pou ena set lane lafaminn e dimoun pou bliye tou labondans. Lafaminn la pou akable Lezip.
41.31: Telman lafaminn la pou grav, tou dimoun pou bliye ki vedir labondans.
41.32: To finn fer de rev ki ena mem sinifikasion. Sa montre ki Bondie finn fini pran so desizion. Sa pa pou tarde pou arive.
41.33: Asterla, Mazeste, to bizin swazir kikenn ki intelizan ek saz. Donn li lotorite lor Lezip.
41.34: Swazir osi bann ofisie. Fer zot met dekote sink poursan tax lor tou bann rekolt dan Lezip. Zot ava fer sa dan sa set lane ki pe vini la.
41.35: Donn zot lord pou stok bann nouritir pandan sa set lane labondans la. Zot ava gard bann rezerv dible dan tou to bann lavil.
41.36: Koumsa, ava ena ase manze dan Lezip kan set lane lafaminn la vini, e popilasion Lezip pa pou mordefin.”
41.37: Propozision Zozef fer plezir Faraon ek tou so bann ofisie.
41.38: Faraon dir zot: “Ala enn zom ki ranpli avek Lespri Bondie. Kot nou pou gagn enn lot kouma li ankor?”
41.39: Alor, Faraon dir Zozef: “Bondie finn revel twa tousala. Savedir pena personn pli intelizan ek saz ki twa.
41.40: Mo nom twa gouverner mo pei. Tou mo pep pou obeir to lord. Zis mo tousel ki pou pli gran ki twa akoz mo tit lerwa.
41.41: Mo pe donn twa lotorite lor Lezip antie.”
41.42: Faraon tir so bag lerwa dan so ledwa e li met li dan ledwa Zozef. Li fer met bann zoli linz an-lin lor li. Li fer met osi enn kolie lor dan so likou.
41.43: Faraon fer Zozef mont lor kales ki ti rezerve pou so asistan. Bann gard ki divan li kriye: “Donn sime!” Ala ki manier Faraon donn Zozef pouvwar lor Lezip antie.
41.44: Faraon dir Zozef: “Momem Faraon, lerwa Lezip. Me dan mo pei, personn pa pou fer nanye san to permision.”
41.45: Faraon donn Zozef nom Safnat-Panea. Li fer li marye avek Asnat, tifi Potifera ki enn pret dan Onn.
41.46: Apre sa, Zozef kit prezans Faraon pou al fer so travay partou dan Lezip. Li ena 30 an kan li koumans travay pou lerwa Lezip.
41.47: Pandan sa set lane labondans la, ena bann gran-gran rekolt dan pei.
41.48: Zozef profite pou rezerv nouritir partou dan Lezip. Dan sak lavil, li fer stok bann nouritir ki rekolte dan bann plantasion.
41.49: Li fer bann gran rezerv dible. Ena otan dible ki disab dan bor lamer. Finn nepli kapav fer kont, telman ena boukou.
41.50: Avan lafaminn koumanse, Zozef ek so fam Asnat gagn de garson.
41.51: Zozef apel premie la Manase. Li dir: “Bondie finn fer mwa bliye mo soufrans ek mo separasion ar mo fami.”
41.52: Li apel so deziem garson Efraim. Li dir: “Bondie finn donn mwa zanfan dan pei kot mo finn soufer.”
41.53: Set lane labondans termine dan Lezip.
41.54: Lerla, set lane lafaminn koumanse, parey kouma Zozef ti dir. Ena lafaminn dan lezot pei osi. Me dan Lezip, ena boukou manze.
41.55: Kan bann Ezipsien koumans soufer lafin, zot dimann Faraon nouritir. Faraon dir zot: “Al get Zozef, e fer tou seki li dir zot.”
41.56: Lafaminn pe fer ravaz partou dan Lezip. Zozef fer ouver tou bann grenie e li vann dible ek bann Ezipsien. Pli ale, lafaminn vinn ankor pli grav.
41.57: Bann lezot pei osi pe soufer lafaminn. Bann dimoun sorti partou e vinn aste dible avek Zozef dan Lezip.

42.1: Zakob gagn nouvel ki ena dible dan Lezip. Li dir so bann garson: “Kifer zot pe res la, nanye-fer?
42.2: Mo finn tann dir ki ena manze dan Lezip. Ale! Al aste manze pou nou. Koumsa nou ava res vivan. Kifer nou bizin mor?”
42.3: Alor, dis gran-frer Zozef al Lezip pou aste dible.
42.4: Zakob pa les Benzamin, ti-frer Zozef, al avek zot. Li per tansion enn maler ariv li.
42.5: Bann garson Izrael ariv Lezip ansam ar bann lezot dimoun ki finn vinn aste dible. Lafaminn terib dan pei Kanaan.
42.6: Zozef gouverner Lezip, e limem vann dible ar tou dimoun. So bann frer vini e zot prostern divan li.
42.7: Kan Zozef trouv so bann frer, toutswit li rekonet zot, me li pa les zot rekonet li. Li dimann zot: “Kot zot sorti?” Zot reponn: “Nou sorti Kanaan, Misie. Nou finn vinn isi pou aste manze.”
42.8: Zozef finn rekonet so bann frer, me zot, zot pa rekonet li.
42.9: Zozef rapel bann rev ki li ti fer lor zot. Lerla, li dir zot: “Mo kone zot bann espion. Zot finn vinn get bann pwin feb dan nou pei.”
42.10: Zot reponn li: “Non, misie, to bann serviter finn vinn aste manze.
42.11: Nou tou frer. Nou ena mem papa. Nou bann dimoun onet. To bann serviter pa bann espion.”
42.12: Me Zozef reponn: “Zot pe koz manti! Zot finn vini pou espionn nou pei.”
42.13: Zot reponn: “Non Misie, nou sorti dan mem fami. Nou papa res dan pei kanaan. Nou ti a 12 frer. Enn finn mor. Pli zenn la finn res avek nou papa.”
42.14: Me Zozef dir zot: “Mo kone zot bann espion.
42.15: Me mo pou gete si zot pe koz vre. Lor nom Faraon, zot pa pou retourn kot zot tanki zot ti-frer pa vinn isi.
42.16: Fer enn parmi zot al sers zot ti-frer. Lezot pou res isi dan prizon. Koumsa, mo pou kone si zot finn koz laverite. Sinon, lor nom Faraon, mo pou kone ki vremem zot bann espion.”
42.17: Zozef fer met zot dan prizon pandan trwa zour.
42.18: Lor trwaziem zour, Zozef dir zot: “Mo ena boukou respe pou Bondie. Mo pou donn zot enn sans pou viv, me zot bizin fer tou seki mo dir zot.
42.19: Si vremem zot onet, fer enn parmi zot res dan prizon isi. Lezot ava ale avek dible pou zot bann fami ki pe soufer lafaminn.
42.20: Apre, zot ava revini avek zot ti-frer. Koumsa, mo pou kone si zot finn koz vre e personn pa pou perdi lavi.” Zot tou dakor.
42.21: Apre sa, zot dir ant zot: “Nou pe pey pese pou seki nou finn fer nou frer. Nou ti trouv so laper dan so lizie kan li ti pe sipliy nou. Me nou pa ti ekout li. Ala kifer zordi nou dan problem.”
42.22: Lerla, Riben dir zot: “Mo ti bien dir zot pa fer sa piti la ditor. Me zot pa ti ekout mwa. Azordi, nou pe pey pou so lamor.”
42.23: Zot pa kone si Zozef konpran zot langaz, parski li servi enn interpret pou koz avek zot.
42.24: Zozef sorti pou plore. Lerla, li retourne pou koz avek zot. Li dir zot ki Simeon pou res dan prizon. Li fer ansenn Simeon divan zot.
42.25: Zozef donn lord pou ranpli zot sak ar dible. Li fer remet zot larzan dan zot sak, e li fer donn zot manze pou vwayaz. Bannla obeir so lord.
42.26: Bann frer Zozef met zot bann sak dible lor zot bourik e zot pran larout pou retourn kot zot.
42.27: Zot aret dan enn plas pou pas lanwit. Enn parmi ouver so sak pou donn so bourik manze. Li gagn sok kan li trouv so larzan dan so sak.
42.28: Lerla, li kriye so bann frer e li dir zot: “Bannla finn rann mwa mo larzan! Alalila, dan mo sak!” Zot koumans tranble ar laper. Zot dir ant zot: “Kifer Bondie finn fer sa avek nou?”
42.29: Kan zot ariv dan Kanaan, zot rakont zot papa Zakob tou seki finn pase.
42.30: Zot dir li: “Gouverner sa pei la finn met dir ar nou. Li ti pran nou pou bann espion.
42.31: Me nou ti fer li kone ki nou pa ti bann espion, me bann zom onet.
42.32: Nou ti dir li: ‘Nou a 12 frer. Enn finn mor, e pli zenn la finn res avek nou papa dan Kanaan.’
42.33: Lerla Misie la ti oule kone si nou ti pe koz laverite. Li ti deside pou fer enn parmi nou res dan prizon. Li ti dir nou pran dible e amenn pou nou bann fami ki pe soufer lafaminn.
42.34: Li ti dir nou osi: ‘Amenn zot ti-frer isi. Mo ava kone si zot finn dir laverite e si vremem zot pa bann espion. Lerla mo pou larg zot frer, e zot pou lib pou ale-vini dan pei.’”
42.35: Plitar, kan zot devid zot sak, sakenn trouv so larzan dan so sak. Ler Zakob ek so bann garson trouv sa, zot gagn bien per.
42.36: Lerla, Zakob, zot papa, dir zot: “Zot finn fer mwa perdi mo bann zanfan. Deza mo finn perdi Zozef ek Simeon. Asterla, zot oule pran Benzamin osi? Mwa ki pe soufer dan tousala.”
42.37: Riben dir so papa: “Si mo pa retourn Benzamin, to ava touy mo de garson. Kit li dan mo lame. Mo promet twa mo pou retourn avek li.”
42.38: Zakob reponn: “Mo finn dir non! Mo garson pa pou al avek zot. So frer finn mor e res zis li. Zot kone mo finn vinn vie. Si enn maler ariv li dan zot vwayaz, zot pou fer mwa mor ar sagrin dan mo vie zour.”

43.1: Sa lepok la, lafaminn pe fer ravaz dan pei Kanaan.
43.2: Zakob ek so fami finn fini manz tou nouritir ki zot ti finn aste dan Lezip. Lerla, Zakob dir so bann garson: “Al aste ankor inpe manze dan Lezip.”
43.3: Zida reponn: “Gouverner la finn donn nou enn warning. Li pa pou resevwar nou si nou ti-frer pa avek nou.
43.4: Si to les Benzamin al avek nou, nou pou al aste manze pou twa.
43.5: Me si to refize, nou pa pou ale, parski misie la finn met nou angard. Li finn dir: ‘Mo pa pou resevwar zot si zot ti-frer pa avek zot.’”
43.6: Izrael dir: “Zot finn met mwa dan lapenn. Kifer zot ti bizin dir misie la ki zot ena enn lot frer?”
43.7: Zot reponn: “Gouverner la ti poz nou boukou kestion lor noumem ek lor nou fami. Li ti oule kone si nou papa ti ankor vivan. Li ti dimann nou si nou ti ena ankor frer. Nou ti zis reponn so bann kestion. Nou pa ti kone si li ti pou dir nou amenn nou frer.”
43.8: Lerla Zida dir: “Papa, les piti la vinn avek mwa. Nou bizin ale pouki twa, nou bann fami ek noumem viv. Nou pa anvi mordefin!
43.9: Mo pou responsab li. Si mo pa retourn li, mo pou koupab divan twa toutlong mo lavi.
43.10: Si nou pa ti perdi letan koumsa, nou ti pou fini ale-vini de fwa.”
43.11: Lerla, zot papa, Izrael dir zot: “Si pou koumsa, ala seki zot bizin fer: Pran avek zot bann meyer prodwi nou pei: parfin, zepis, dimiel, larezinn, pistas, ek zamann. Zot ava donn gouverner la tousala kouma enn kado.
43.12: Amenn de fwa plis larzan avek zot. Zot ava retourn sa larzan ki zot ti trouv dan zot sak la. Kitfwa kikenn ti fer enn erer.
43.13: Amenn zot frer Benzamin avek zot e al get sa misie la.
43.14: Mo priye ki Bondie Toupwisan tous so leker. Li ava gagn pitie pou zot, e li ava les Benzamin ek Simeon revinn avek zot. Mwa, mo ava res tousel, koumadir zame mo ti ena zanfan.”
43.15: Bann garson Izrael pran avek zot bann kado. Zot pran osi de fwa plis larzan, e Zot desann Lezip avek Benzamin. Zot al prezant zot divan Zozef.
43.16: Kan Zozef trouv Benzamin avek zot, li dir so sef-serviter: “Amenn sa bann dimoun la kot mwa. Fer touy enn zanimo e prepar manze. Sa bann dimoun la pou manz avek mwa midi.”
43.17: Sef-serviter la fer seki Zozef finn dir. Li amenn bann la kot so met.
43.18: Kan fer zot rant kot Zozef, zot gagn per. Zot dir ant zot: “Finn amenn nou isi akoz larzan ki ti remet dan nou sak lot fwa la. Sirman zot pou aret nou. Zot pou pran nou bann bourik e zot pou fer nou vinn esklav.”
43.19: Alor, zot desid pou koz avek sef-serviter Zozef divan laport.
43.20: Zot dir li: “Exkize Misie, nou finn deza vinn aste manze lot-fwa.
43.21: Lor sime, nou ti arete pou pas lanwit. Kan nou ti ouver nou sak, sakenn ti trouv so larzan dan so sak. Ti ena mem som ki nou ti peye. Me zordi, nou finn retourn sa kas la.
43.22: Nou finn amenn kas anplis pou aste ankor inpe manze. Nou pa kone kisannla ti remet nou larzan dan nou sak.”
43.23: Lerla, zom la dir zot: “Tou korek! Pa bizin per! Zot Bondie, Bondie zot papa ki finn met enn trezor dan zot sak. Mwa mo kone mo ti ankes zot larzan.” Lerla, li fer larg Simeon.
43.24: Zom la fer zot rant dan lakaz Zozef. Li donn zot dilo pou lav zot lipie. Li fer donn zot bann bourik lerb pou manze.
43.25: Bann frer la tann dir ki zot pou manz avek Zozef midi. Alor, zot prepar zot bann kado pou donn li.
43.26: Kouma Zozef rant kot li, zot donn li bann kado la. Apre sa, zot prostern divan li avek respe.
43.27: Zozef pran zot nouvel. Lerla li dimann zot: “Zot vie papa ki manier? Eski li ankor vivan?”
43.28: Zot reponn: “Wi met! To serviter bien. Li ankor vivan.” Zot prostern ankor enn fwa divan li avek respe.
43.29: Zozef remark Benzamin, so vre frer. Li dir zot: “Limem zot ti-frer ki zot ti koz avek mwa la? Bondie beni twa mo garson!”
43.30: Zozef ranpli ar lemosion kan li trouv Benzamin. Larm vinn dan so lizie. Lerla li degaze al dan so lasam pou plore.
43.31: Apre sa, li lav so figir e li revini. Li fer zefor pou kontrol so lemosion. Lerla, li donn lord pou servi manze.
43.32: Zot servi Zozef apar lor enn latab. So bann frer manz lor enn lot latab. Bann Ezipsien ki la osi manz apar. Zot pa kapav manz avek bann Ebre parski sa konsidere kouma enn ofans dan zot relizion.
43.33: Bann frer la asiz anfas Zozef. Fer zot asiz an-ran dapre zot laz, depi pli gran ziska pli zenn. Zot get zot kamarad avek etonnman.
43.34: Zozef fer servi zot manze ki lor so latab. Benzamin gagn sink fwa plis ki lezot. Zot bwar divin ansam ar zozef, e zot dan lazwa.

44.1: Plitar, Zozef donn lord so sef-serviter: “Ranpli sak sa bann zom la. Donn zot otan ki zot kapav amene. Remet tou zot kas dan zot sak.
44.2: Dan sak pli zenn la, to met so kas, plis mo koup anarzan.” Sef-serviter la fer tou seki Zozef dir li.
44.3: Landime, boner gramatin, bann garson Izrael gagn permision pou ale avek zot bann bourik.
44.4: Zot kit lavil pou retourn kot zot. Me zot ankor ase pre ar lavil, kan Zozef dir so sef-serviter: “Pourswiv sa bann dimoun la. Kan to zwenn zot, dimann zot: ‘Kifer zot finn rann lemal pou lebien?
44.5: Kifer zot finn kokin koup mo met? Li servi sa koup la pou li bwar. Li osi servi sa koup la pou li lir lavenir. Li pa bon seki zot finn fer.’”
44.6: Alor, sef-serviter la pourswiv zot, e kan li zwenn zot, li dir zot seki Zozef finn dir li.
44.7: Bann frer la reponn: “Misie, kifer to pe akiz nou koumsa? Zame to bann serviter pou oze fer enn zafer parey.
44.8: Nou finn mem retourn kas ki nou ti trouv dan nou sak kan nou ti ariv Kanaan. Asterla, kifer nou pou kokin larzan ouswa lor dan lakaz to met?
44.9: Misie, si to trouv sa koup la dan sak kikenn, to ava touy li. Leres ava vinn to esklav.”
44.10: Li dir zot: “Dakor! Anou fer koumsa! Me zis koupab la ki pou vinn mo esklav. Lezot pou lib pou retourn kot zot.”
44.11: Zot degaze met zot sak anba, e sakenn ouver pou li.
44.12: Zom la fouy tou zot sak. Li koumans par seki pli gran pou fini par seki pli zenn. Alor, li trouv koup la dan sak Benzamin.
44.13: Letan bannla trouv sa, zot gagn sok e zot desir zot linz. Lerla zot remet zot sak lor zot bourik, e zot retourn dan lavil.
44.14: Zida ek so bann frer ariv kot Zozef ki ankor lamem. Zot tou tom dan so lipie.
44.15: Lerla, Zozef dimann zot: “Kifer zot finn fer sa? Zot pa ti kone enn zom kouma mwa ena pouvwar pou devinn tou kitsoz?”
44.16: Zida reponn: “Ki nou kapav dir twa, Misie Gouverner? Nou pena parol pou prouv nou inosans. Bondie finn trouv nou koupab akoz nou fot. Ala nou la! Nou tou to bann esklav, ansam avek sa enn ki ti ena koup la dan so sak.”
44.17: Me Zozef dir: “Non, mo pa pou fer enn zafer parey. Zis seki ti ena mo koup ki pou vinn mo esklav. Lezot pou kapav retourn anpe kot zot papa.”
44.18: Zida koste ar Zozef e dir: “Misie Gouverner, mo kone to ena preske mem pouvwar ki lerwa Lezip. Alor, mo sipliy twa, pa ankoler avek mwa, to serviter. Permet mwa dir twa enn ti koze.
44.19: Premie fwa nou ti vini, to ti dimann nou si nou papa ti ankor la. To ti anvi kone si nou ti ena ankor frer.
44.20: Nou ti dir twa ki nou vie papa ti ankor vivan. Nou ti fer twa kone osi ki nou ti ena enn ti-frer. Nou papa finn gagn li dan so vie zour. Li sel garson ki reste pou so mama. So lot frer finn mor. Akoz sa nou papa kontan li boukou.
44.21: To ti dir nou amenn li isi pouki to trouv li.
44.22: Nou ti dir twa ki sa garson la pa pou kapav kit so papa, sinon so papa pou mor.
44.23: Me to ti dir nou ki to pa pou resevwar nou si nou ti-frer pa avek nou.
44.24: Alor, nou ti retourn kot to serviter, nou papa, e nou ti rakont li tou seki to ti dir.
44.25: Plitar, nou papa ti dir nou retourn Lezip pou aste ankor inpe manze.
44.26: Lerla, nou ti redir li: ‘Nou pa kapav al Lezip, sof si nou ti-frer al avek nou. Si li pa avek nou, gouverner la pa pou resevwar nou.’
44.27: Lerla nou papa, to serviter, ti dir nou: ‘Zot kone, mo fam Rasel finn donn mwa zis de garson.
44.28: Enn finn disparet. Mo bien krwar ki enn zanimo sovaz finn devor li, parski mo pa finn trouv li ankor.
44.29: Zot pe rod pran sannla osi! Zot kone mo finn vinn vie. Si enn maler ariv li, mo pou mor ar sagrin par zot lafot.’
44.30: Asterla, Misie Gouverner, mo pa pou kapav al kot mo papa san sa zanfan la. Mo papa atase boukou avek li.
44.31: Li pou mor si li pa trouv zanfan la avek nou. Si li mor ar sagrin dan so vie zour, nou ki pou koupab.
44.32: Anplis, mo finn pran responsabilite zanfan la divan mo papa. Mo ti dir li sa parol la: ‘Si mo pa retourn zanfan la, mo pou koupab divan twa toutlong mo lavi.’
44.33: Mo sipliy twa, Misie Gouverner, fer mwa to esklav dan plas Benzamin. Les li retourn avek so bann frer.
44.34: Zame mo pa pou kapav retourn kot mo papa san li. Mo pa pou kapav get soufrans mo papa.”

45.1: Zozef nepli kapav tini so lemosion divan so bann travayer. Li fer zot tou sorti deor. Kan li tousel avek so bann frer, li fer zot kone ki limem Zozef.
45.2: Li koumans plore for-for. Bann Ezipsien tann li, e sa nouvel la al ziska kot Faraon.
45.3: Zozef dir so bann frer: “Momem Zozef! Eski mo papa ankor vivan?” Me so bann frer dan sok e parol pa sorti dan zot labous.
45.4: Alor, Zozef dir zot: “Vinn pre ar mwa!” Bannla koste. Zozef dir: “Mwa sa, zot frer, Zozef, ki zot ti vande pou amenn Lezip.
45.5: Asterla, pa bizin sagrin e pa bizin regrete ki zot finn vann mwa isi. Bondie ki finn avoy mwa isi avan zot pou sap zot lavi.
45.6: Sa fer dezan depi ki lafaminn finn koumanse dan pei. Me li pou dire ankor sink an, e pa pou kapav ni plante ni rekolte.
45.7: Bondie finn avoy mwa dan sa pei la avan zot. Li ti anvi ki zot desandan res vivan lor later. Ala ki manier li finn donn zot so gran delivrans.
45.8: Pa zot ki finn avoy mwa isi, me Bondie. Li finn fer mwa vinn kouma enn papa pou Faraon. Li finn fer mwa vinn sef tou bann travayer lerwa, e gouverner Lezip antie.
45.9: Asterla, degaze retourn kot mo papa. Dir li so garson Zozef finn dir: ‘Bondie finn fer mwa vinn gouverner Lezip antie. Vinn kot mwa vit, pa tarde.
45.10: To ava res pre ar mwa dan rezion Gosenn. To ava viv laba avek to bann zanfan ek to bann tizanfan. Amenn osi to bann troupo mouton, kabri, bef, ek tou seki to posede.
45.11: Lafaminn pou dire ankor sink an. Me mo pou donn twa manze pou twa, to lafami, ek tou to bann zanimo. Zot pa pou mank nanye isi.’
45.12: Zot tou trouve! Mo ti-frer Benzamin osi trouve! Mwa, zot frer Zozef ki pe koz avek zot.
45.13: Asterla, al dir mo papa ki plas inportan mo finn gagne dan Lezip. Rakont li tou seki zot finn trouve. Lerla, degaze amenn li isi.”
45.14: Zozef tom dan likou so frer Benzamin. Zot toulede plore.
45.15: Li kontign plore e li anbras so bann lezot frer. Apre tousala, so bann frer koumans koz avek li.
45.16: Bann dimoun dan sato lerwa tande ki bann frer Zozef dan Lezip. Sa nouvel la fer Faraon ek so bann minis plezir.
45.17: Faraon dir Zozef: “Dir to bann frer met zot bagaz lor zot bann bourik e retourn Kanaan.
45.18: Al sers zot papa ek tou zot fami, e amenn zot tou isi. Mo pou permet zot res dan enn landrwa kot ena meyer patiraz. Zot pou kapav manz bann meyer prodwi nou pei.
45.19: Anplis, dir zot pran bann saryo dan lezip pou amenn zot fam, zot zanfan, ek zot papa. Lerla, zot ava retourn isi.
45.20: Dir zot pa kas latet ar zot dibien ki zot pou kite laba. Isi, zot pou dan bien, parski zot pou gagn meyer later dan Lezip.”
45.21: Bann zanfan Izrael fer seki lerwa finn dir. Zozef donn zot bann saryo ek manze pou zot vwayaz, parey kouma Faraon finn ordone.
45.22: Zozef donn so bann frer sakenn enn linz nef. Me li donn Benzamin sink linz nef ek 300 pies larzan.
45.23: Zozef fer zot amenn bann kado pou so papa osi. Parmi, ena dis bourik mal ki sarye bann bon prodwi Lezip. Ena osi 10 femel bourik ki sarye dible, dipin, ek manze pou so vwayaz.
45.24: Li dir so bann frer: “Pa bizin perdi letan dan bann diskision lor larout.” Apre sa, li les zot ale.
45.25: Bannla kit lezip e retourn kot zot papa Zakob dan Kanaan.
45.26: Kan zot ariv laba, zot anons zot papa sa nouvel la: “Zozef ankor vivan! Li finn mem vinn gouverner dan pei Lezip.” Zakob gagn sok; li pa krwar zot.
45.27: Me zot koumans rakont li tou seki Zozef ti dir. Anplis, zot montre li bann saryo ki Zozef finn avoye pou so vwayaz. Sa donn li boukou kouraz.
45.28: Alafin, Zakob dir: “Asterla, mo krwar! Mo garson, Zozef, ankor vivan. Mo bizin al get li avan mo mor.”

46.1: Zakob pran tou seki li ena, e li koumans so vwayaz pou al Lezip. Li ariv dan Berseba. Laba, li ofer bann sakrifis anloner Bondie ki so papa Izaak ti adore.
46.2: Aswar, Bondie koz avek Izrael dan enn rev e dir li: “Zakob! Zakob!” Li reponn: “Wi, mo pe ekout twa.”
46.3: Bondie dir li: “Momem Bondie, Bondie to papa. Pa bizin per pou al Lezip. Mo pou fer to bann desandan vinn enn gran pep laba.
46.4: Mo pou al avek twa dan Lezip, e enn zour, mo pou fer twa retourn isi. Kan to pou mor, Zozef pou ferm to lizie ar so prop lame.”
46.5: Zakob kit Berseba. So bann garson met li, zot fam ek zot zanfan, dan bann kales ki Faraon ti done pou zot vwayaz.
46.8: Ala lalis bann Izraelit ki finn al dan Lezip avek Zakob: Riben, so premiene,
46.9: ek so bann garson Enok, Palou, Esronn, ek Karmi.
46.10: Simeon ek so bann garson, Yemouel, Yamin, Ohad, Yakin, Soar, ek Saoul. Mama Saoul enn Kananeenn.
46.11: Levi ek so bann garson Gersonn, Keat, ek Merari.
46.12: Zida ek so bann garson Sela, Peres, ek Zera. Zida ti ena de lot garson, Er ek Onann. Me zot ti mor dan pei Kanaan. Peres ena de garson, Esronn ek Amoul.
46.13: Isakar ek so bann garson Tola, Pouva, Yasoub # 46:13 Yasoub: Dan Nonb 26: 24 ek dan Kronik 7 : 1, so nom Yob. , ek Simronn.
46.14: Zabilon ek so bann garson Sered, Elon, ek Yaleel.
46.15: Sa bannla bann garson Lea ek Zakob. Zot finn ne dan Padann-Aram. Ena osi zot tifi Dina. Avek zot bann zanfan, zot ti 33 antou.
46.16: Gad ek so bann garson Sifionn, Agi, Souni, Esbon, Eri, Arodi, ek Areli.
46.17: Aser ek so bann garson Imna, Isva, Isvi, ek Beria. Ena osi zot ser Sera. Beria ena de garson: Eber ek Malkiel.
46.18: Sa bannla 16 desandan Zilpa ek Zakob. Zilpa mem ki Laban ti donn so tifi Lea kouma servant.
46.19: Rasel, fam Zakob, finn donn li de garson: Zozef ek Benzamin.
46.20: Zozef finn gagn Manase ek Efraim avek so fam Asnat dan Lezip. Papa Asnat apel Potifera, enn pret dan Onn.
46.21: Benzamin ena dis garson: Bela, Beker, Asbel, Gera, Naaman, Ei, Ros, Moupim, Houpim, ek Ard.
46.22: Sa bannla 14 desandan Zakob ek Rasel.
46.24: Neftali ek so bann garson Yasiel, Gouni, Yetzer, ek Silem.
46.25: Sa bannla set desandan Bila ek Zakob. Bila mem ki Laban ti donn so tifi Rasel kouma servant.
46.26: Bann desandan Zakob ki finn al Lezip avek li, zot antou 66. Ladan, pa kont so bann belfi.
46.27: Zozef ena de garson ki finn ne dan Lezip. Alor, ena antou 70 # 46:27 Gagn 70 kan azout tou bann desandan Lea, Zilpa, Rasel ek Bila. Get verse 15, 18, 22 ek 25. Me de parmi bann zanfan Zida, (get verse 12) ti fini mor dan Kanaan. desandan Zakob ki finn al Lezip.
46.28: Izrael avoy Zida par devan kot Zozef pou prepar so vwayaz dan Gosenn. Kan zot ariv laba,
46.29: Zozef prepar so kales, e li al akeyir so papa dan Gosenn. Kouma li zwenn so papa, li may so likou e li plore enn bon letan.
46.30: Izrael dir Zozef: “Asterla mo kapav mor trankil, parski mo finn retrouv twa vivan.”
46.31: Zozef dir so bann frer e tou lafami so papa: “Mo pe al dir Faraon ki mo bann frer ek tou lafami mo papa ki sorti Kanaan, finn vini.
46.32: Mo pou fer li kone ki zot bann elver, e ki zot okip bann troupo. Mo pou osi fer li kone ki zot finn vinn avek zot bann troupo mouton, kabri, bef, ek tou zot dibien.
46.33: Faraon pou apel zot e pou dimann zot ki travay zot fer.
46.34: Zot bizin reponn: ‘Nou, to bann serviter, finn okip zanimo depi nou zenes ziska asterla. Parey kouma nou bann anset ti fer avan nou.’ Lerla, li pou permet zot res dan rezion Gosenn, parski bann Ezipsien pa kontan bann elver mouton ek kabri.”

47.1: Zozef al kot Faraon e dir li: “Mo papa ek mo bann frer ki ti pe res dan Kanaan finn arive. Zot finn vini avek tou zot bann troupo zanimo, ek tou seki zot posede. Asterla, zot dan rezion Gosenn.”
47.2: Li prezant Faraon sink parmi so bann frer.
47.3: Faraon dimann zot: “Ki travay zot fer?” Zot reponn: “Mazeste, nou elve zanimo, parey kouma nou bann anset.
47.4: Lasesres pe tap for dan pei Kanaan. Finn nepli ena lerb pou nou bann troupo laba. Akoz sa, nou finn vinn isi. Nou sipliy twa, permet nou res dan rezion Gosenn.”
