47.5: Lerla, Faraon dir Zozef: “To papa ek to bann frer finn vinn kot twa.
47.6: Pei Lezip antie divan twa. To kapav fer zot res dan meyer landrwa. Pena problem si zot res dan Gosenn. Anplis, si to trouve ki ena bann dimoun serye parmi zot, met zot ansarz mo prop troupo.”
47.7: Apre sa, Zozef prezant Faraon so papa Zakob. Zakob salye Faraon avek enn gran respe.
47.8: Lerla, Faraon dimann Zakob: “Ki laz to ena?”
47.9: Zakob reponn: “Ena 130 an depi ki mo lor later. Mo finn touzour bizin deplase dan plizir landrwa, kouma enn etranze. Mo bann anset osi ti bizin deplase kouma bann etranze. Pourtan, zot finn viv boukou pli lontan ki mwa. Mo lavi finn pas vit, e mo finn konn boukou difikilte.”
47.10: Zakob salye Faraon ankor enn fwa, apre li sorti.
47.11: Zozef fer seki Faraon finn dir. Li fer so papa ek so bann frer res dan rezion Ramses, meyer landrwa dan Lezip. Li mem fer zot vinn propriyeter zot terin.
47.12: Zozef nouri so papa, so bann frer, ek tou zot fami. Li donn zot manze dapre kantite dimoun ki ena dan zot lakaz.
47.13: Lafaminn terib e pena manze dan plizir pei. Dan Lezip ek dan Kanaan, bann dimoun pe koumans deperi.
47.14: Zot vinn aste dible ar Zozef. Ala ki manier Zozef ramas tou larzan dan Lezip ek dan Kanaan. Li depoz sa larzan la kot Faraon.
47.15: Ariv enn letan, larzan bann Ezipsien ek bann Kananeen fini. Tou bann Ezipsien vinn get Zozef. Zot dir li: “Donn nou manze. Pa les nou mor divan twa, zis parski nou nepli ena kas.”
47.16: Zozef dir zot: “Si zot nepli ena kas, donn mwa zot bann zanimo. Anretour, mo pou donn zot manze.”
47.17: Alor, zot amenn zot bann zanimo ar Zozef. Li donn zot dible kont zot seval, zot bef, zot mouton, zot kabri ek zot bourik. Toutlong lane, Zozef donn zot manze kont zot bann zanimo.
47.18: Lane swivan, zot revinn get Zozef e zot dir li: “Misie Gouverner, kouma to kone, nou nepli ena kas. Nou bann zanimo deza pou twa asterla. Nou nepli ena nanye, sof noumem ek nou bann terin.
47.19: Kifer nou bizin mor divan twa? Nou bann terin pou res abandone. Aste nou ek nou bann terin, e donn nou manze. Nou ava vinn esklav Faraon, e li ava servi nou bann terin. Donn nou dible. Lerla nou pa pou mor, e nou terin pa pou abandone.”
47.20: Ala ki manier Zozef aste tou bann terin dan Lezip pou Faraon. Lafaminn telman grav, ki tou dimoun vann zot terin. Alor, Faraon vinn propriyeter tou bann terin dan Lezip.
47.21: Depi enn bout Lezip ziska lot bout, tou dimoun vinn esklav Faraon.
47.22: Zis terin bann pret ki Zozef pa kapav aste. Ena enn lalwa dan zot faver. Faraon donn zot enn pansion pou zot manze. Akoz sa, zot pa bizin vann zot terin.
47.23: Enn zour, Zozef koz avek popilasion Lezip e li dir zot: “Zot kone ki mo finn aste zot ek zot terin pou Faraon. Asterla, mo pou donn zot semans pou zot plante.
47.24: Me kan zot rekolte, zot bizin donn Faraon 20 poursan zot rekolt. Zot kapav gard leres pou semans e pou nouri zot fami.”
47.25: Zot dir li: “Misie Gouverner, to finn bon anver nou, e to finn sap nou lavi. Nou dakor pou vinn esklav Faraon.”
47.26: Alor, Zozef fer enn lalwa ki ankor existe ziska zordi: Dan Lezip, 20 poursan tou bann rekolt bizin vinn pou Faraon. Zis terin bann pret ki pa vinn pou Faraon.
47.27: Bann Izraelit pe res dan rezion Gosenn, dan Lezip. Zot vinn propriyeter terin e zot gagn boukou zanfan.
47.28: Zakob res 17 an dan Lezip. Li viv antou 147 an.
47.29: Kan Zakob santi lamor aprose, li fer apel Zozef, e li dir li: “Si vremem to kontan mwa, montre mwa to lamour ek to fidelite. Met to lame anba mo lakwis # 47:29 Get sapit 24 verse 2, ek so not. e fer serman ki to pa pou anter mwa dan Lezip.
47.30: Kan mo mor to ava amenn mo lekor andeor Lezip. To ava al anter mwa dan tonbo mo bann anset.” Zozef reponn li: “Mo pou fer seki to finn dir, papa.”
47.31: Me Zakob dir li: “Promet mwa!” Zozef promet li. Lerla, Zakob prosterne kot dosie so lili.

48.1: Enn zour, Zozef gagn nouvel ki so papa malad. Li pran so de garson, Manase ek Efraim, e li al get so papa.
48.2: Bannla dir Zakob ki Zozef finn vinn get li. Li fer enn gran zefor e li asiz lor so lili.
48.3: Li dir Zozef: “Bondie Toupwisan ti aparet avek mwa dan Louz, dan pei Kanaan. Li ti beni mwa.
48.4: Li ti dir mwa: ‘Mo pou donn twa boukou desandan. To pou vinn anset enn gran nasion. Mo pou donn to bann desandan sa pei la pou touzour.’”
48.5: Zakob azoute: “To finn gagn de garson dan Lezip avan ki mo vinn kot twa. Zordi mo konsider Efraim ek Manase kouma mo prop zanfan, parey kouma Riben ek Simeon.
48.6: Bann zanfan ki to pou gagne apre zot, pou res pou twa. Zot ava gagn enn par dan teritwar zot de gran frer.
48.7: Enn zour, mo ti pe sorti Padann-Aram, pou al Efrata dan Kanaan. Zis avan nou ti ariv laba, to mama Rasel ti mor divan mwa. Mo ti anter li laba, dan bor larout Efrata, setadir Betleem.”
48.8: Lerla, lizie Zakob tap lor bann zanfan Zozef. Li dimande: “Pou ki sa bann zanfan la?”
48.9: Zozef reponn so papa: “Mo de garson ki Bondie finn donn mwa isi, dan Lezip.” Zakob dir li: “Fer zot koste ar mwa, pou mo beni zot.”
48.10: Zakob vie, e li pa trouv bien kler. Zozef fer so de garson koste ar li. Zakob ser zot dan so lebra e li anbras zot.
48.11: Lerla, li dir Zozef: “Mo pa ti krwar si enn zour mo pou retrouv twa. Me Bondie finn permet mwa trouv to bann zanfan osi.”
48.12: Zozef tir so bann garson lor zenou so papa. Lerla, li prostern divan so papa.
48.13: Apre, li trap lame so de garson. Efraim dan so lame drwat, kote gos Zakob. Manase dan so lame gos, kote drwat Zakob. Zozef fer zot apros ar Zakob ankor enn fwa.
48.14: Me kan Zakob beni zot, li fer so lame krwaze. Li poz so lame drwat lor latet Efraim ki pli zenn. E li poz so lame gos lor latet Manase ki pli gran.
48.15: Lerla, li beni Zozef par sa bann parol la: “Bondie ki mo granper Abraam ek mo papa Izaak ti adore, Bondie ki finn touzour mo berze depi ki mo finn ne ziska zordi,
48.16: e anz ki finn tir mwa dan tou danze, beni sa de zanfan la! Zot ava gard mo nom vivan, Parey kouma nom mo granper Abraam, ek mo papa Izaak. Bondie ava donn zot boukou desandan lor later.”
48.17: Zozef remarke ki so papa finn met so lame drwat lor latet Efraim. Li pa kontan. Li trap lame drwat so papa pou met lor latet Manase.
48.18: Li dir so papa: “To pe fer erer, papa! Ala pli gran la isi. Met to lame drwat lor so latet.”
48.19: Me so papa refize, e dir li: “Mo kone kisannla pli gran mo garson. Bann desandan Manase pou vinn enn gran pep. Me Efraim pou vinn pli gran ki li. So bann desandan pou form plizir nasion.”
48.20: Sa zour la, Zakob donn zot so benediksion e li dir: “Bann Izraelit pou servi zot nom pou pronons bann benediksion. Zot pou dir: ‘Bondie beni twa, Kouma li ti beni Efraim ek Manase.’” Ala ki manier Zakob sit nom Efraim avan Manase.
48.21: Apre sa, li dir Zozef: “Mo ler pre pou arive. Me Bondie pou avek zot. Li pou fer zot retourn dan pei mo bann anset.
48.22: Mwa, mo donn twa enn pli gran par ki to bann frer. Mo donn twa rezion Sikem. Mo ti pran sa lavil la avek bann Amorit par lafors mo lepe ek mo fles.”

49.1: Zakob fer apel so bann garson e li dir zot: “Rasanble zot! Mo pou fer zot konn zot lavenir.
49.2: Vinn ansam, ekout mwa, zanfan Zakob, Ekout zot papa Izrael!
49.3: Twa Riben, mo premie zanfan, Mo premie fri kan mo ti ankor portan. To depas to bann frer par to kouraz ek to pwisans.
49.4: To azite kouma dilo larivier, me aster to pou nepli premie. To finn perdi tou to loner parski to ti dormi avek mo fam, anplis, lor mo prop lili.
49.5: Simeon ek Levi, zot bann vre frer. Zot tom dakor pou fer lager.
49.6: Me mo pa pou pran par dan zot plan; Pou sa, zame mo pou ena letan. Wi, dan zot koler, zot finn touy dimoun, pou zot plezir, zot finn bles toro.
49.7: Mo modi zot koler, ek zot move karakter. Mo pou separ zot desandan dan Izrael, Mo pou dispers zot partou dan pei.
49.8: Zida, to bann frer pou onor twa, Zot pou prostern divan twa. To pou ranport laviktwar lor to bann lennmi.
49.9: Zida, mo garson, to kouma enn zenn lion ki sorti lasas e ki finn bien manze. Li rant dan so reper, li kas so pares e li dormi. Kisannla pou oze vinn deranz li?
49.10: Pouvwar rwayal pou res touzour dan fami Zida. Baton sef pou res dan lame bann desandan Zida, Ziska ki enn gran lerwa leve, Kikenn ki lepep pou respekte.
49.11: So karo rezin pou telman ranpli, ki li pa pou ezite pou atas so bourik dan pie rezin. Li pa pou per pou atas so ti-bourik dan meyer brans rezin. Li pou lav so linz dan divin, e so palto dan zi rezin.
49.12: So lizie pou vinn rouz ar labondans divin, so ledan pou blansi ar labondans dile.
49.13: Zabilon pou res dan bor lamer; li pou enn lepor pou bann bato. So teritwar pou al ziska Sidon.
49.14: Isakar solid kouma enn bourik, Li dormi dan so park, antoure ar doub miray.
49.15: Li trouv landrwa la bon, e pei la agreab. Li finn ofer so zepol pou sarye fardo, Li finn aksepte fer enn travay esklav.
49.16: Dann pou gouvern so pep, Parey kouma bann lezot tribi Izrael.
49.17: Dann kouma enn serpan lor larout, enn viper lor sime. Serpan la mord lapat seval, e so kavalie tonbe.
49.18: SEGNER, mo pe atann to delivrans!
49.19: Gad, bann bandi pou atak li, me li pou riposte, e pourswiv zot.
49.20: Aser pou prodwir manze anabondans, Li pou rekolte bann prodwi dign pou lerwa.
49.21: Neftali kouma enn gazel dan lanatir; li gagn bann zoli piti.
49.22: Zozef kouma enn zarb bien ver ki pous pre kot enn larivier. So bann brans al ziska lot kote miray.
49.23: Bann lennmi finn tir kout fles lor li, Zot finn provok li, zot finn fatig li.
49.24: Me li finn tini ferm, ek so zarm dan so lame. So lebra ek so lame pa finn tranble, par lafors Bondie Zakob, Berze ek Protekter Izrael.
49.25: Bondie to papa pou protez twa. Bondie Toupwisan pou beni twa. Li ava donn twa benediksion lapli ki sorti lao dan lesiel, ek dilo lasours ki sorti anba later. Li pou donn twa boukou zanfan, e to bann troupo pou ogmante boukou.
49.26: Zozef, benediksion to papa depas bienfe bann montagn ki existe depi touzour. Li pli ris ki rises bann kolinn eternel. Sa benediksion la ava vers lor latet Zozef, Parmi so bann frer, limem sef.
49.27: Benzamin kouma enn loulou feros; gramatin li devor so viktim, Tanto li partaz leres.”
49.28: Samem bann parol ki Zakob dir so bann garson kan li beni zot. Li donn sakenn enn benediksion spesial. So bann garson form 12 tribi Izrael.
49.29: Apre sa, Zakob dir zot so dernie volonte: “Kan mo mor, anter mwa dan tonbo mo bann anset. Li enn kavern ki trouv lor terin Efron, enn Itit.
49.30: Zot pou trouv li dan Makpela, pre ar Mamre, dan pei Kanaan. Abraam ti aste sa terin la avek Efron pou li fer enn tonbo laba.
49.31: Abraam ek so fam Sara anter laba, parey kouma Izaak ek so fam Rebeka. Momem, mo finn anter mo fam Lea laba.
49.32: Abraam ti aste sa terin la ek so kavern avek bann Itit.”
49.33: Kan Zakob fini koz ar so bann garson, li alonz lor so lili. Lerla, li rann so dernie soupir, e li al rezwenn so bann anset dan lamor.

50.1: Zozef degaze may so papa, li anbras li lor so figir e li plore for-for.
50.2: Zozef donn lord so bann dokter pou anbom lekor so papa.
50.3: Bann dokter la swiv koutim; zot pran 40 zour pou anbom lekor Izrael. Zot servi bann delwil parfime pou konserv so lekor. Bann Ezipsien fer enn dey 70 zour pou Zakob.
50.4: Kan sa 70 zour dey la finn pase, Zozef dir ar bann ki pros ar lerwa: “Si vremem zot ena lamitie pou mwa, koz ek lerwa dan mo faver.
50.5: Avan mo papa ti mor, li ti fer mwa promet pou al anter li dan Kanaan. Li ena enn tonbo laba. Dir Lerwa donn mwa permision pou mo al anter mo papa. Apre sa, mo pou retourne.”
50.6: Faraon dir zot: “Dir Zozef respekte so promes e al anter so papa dan Kanaan.”
50.7: Zozef pran larout pou al anter so papa. Bann minis Faraon ek bann ansien dan Lezip antie al avek li.
50.8: Li amenn osi so fami, so bann frer, ek tout lafami so papa. Zis bann zanfan ek bann troupo res dan Gosenn.
50.9: Bann saryo ek zot kavalie eskort zot. Tousala form enn gran kortez.
50.10: Zot ariv dan enn landrwa ki apel Goren-Atad, dan les larivier Zourdin. Zot organiz enn gran seremoni, e zot fer ankor enn dey set zour dan sa landrwa la.
50.11: Bann Kananeen ki res laba trouv sa lanterman la. Zot dir ant zot: “Lezip dan enn gran dey.” Depi sa, apel sa landrwa la Abel-Misraim, ki vedir dey Lezip.
50.12: Bann garson Zakob fer tou seki zot papa ti finn dir zot.
50.13: Zot amenn so lekor dan Kanaan. Zot anter li dan kavern Makpela ki pre ar Mamre. Abraam ti finn aste sa terin la avek Efron, enn Itit.
50.14: Apre lanterman Zakob, Zozef retourn Lezip avek so bann frer, ek tou seki finn akonpagn li pou lanterman so papa.
50.15: Apre lamor Zakob, bann frer Zozef dir ant zot: “Asterla, nou papa finn mor, kapav Zozef pou ayir nou. Kapav li pou oule vanze pou tou dimal ki nou finn fer li.”
50.16: Alor, zot desid pou al get Zozef, e zot dir li: “Avan nou papa ti mor, li ti dir nou:
50.17: ‘Dir Zozef: Mo sipliy twa, pardonn to bann frer pou zot fot, ek pou tou dimal ki zot finn fer twa.’ Asterla, nou sipliy twa, pardonn nou pou seki nou finn fer twa. Apretou, nou ador mem Bondie ki nou papa.” Ler Zozef tann sa, li plore.
50.18: Lerla, so bann frer osi plore. Zot tom dan so lipie, e zot dir li: “Nou to bann esklav.”
50.19: Me Zozef dir zot: “Pa bizin zot per! Mo pa dan plas Bondie mwa.
50.20: Zot ti anvi fer mwa dimal. Me Bondie finn sanz sa anbien. Bondie ti anvi sov lavi boukou dimoun, e samem finn arive.
50.21: Pa bizin zot pran okenn traka! Mo pou nouri zot ek zot bann fami.” Bann parol Zozef donn so bann frer kouraz.
50.22: Zozef ek fami so papa res Lezip. Li viv ziska 110 an.
50.23: Zozef reysi trouv bann zanfan ek bann tizanfan Efraim. Li mem adopte bann zanfan Makir, garson Manase.
50.24: Avan so lamor, Zozef dir so bann frer: “Mo zour pre pou arive. Me Bondie pou ed zot. Li pou fer zot sorti dan Lezip. Li pou retourn zot dan pei ki li ti promet Abraam, Izaak, ek Zakob.
50.25: Promet mwa ki zot pou amenn mo lezo avek zot kan Bondie pou tir zot dan Lezip.”
50.26: Inpe letan apre, Zozef mor dan Lezip, laz 110 an. Zot anbom so lekor avek delwil parfime e zot met li dan enn serkey dan Lezip.
